name: Venous varicosities of sites other than lower extremity
synonyms: Venous varix

name: Scarring or sclerosing inflammatory dermatoses
definition: A group of inflammatory dermatoses limited to skin and mucous membranes and characterised by variable degrees of sclerosis, fibrosis and atrophy.
cn_name: 瘢痕性或硬化性炎症性皮肤病

name: Burning feet syndrome
definition: Burning feet syndrome is thought to be due to a specific autonomic neuropathy affecting predominantly small fibre cholinergic nerves. It is characterised by an uncomfortable burning sensation on the feet, often accentuated by heat or cold. It may be sporadic, familial or associated with diabetes mellitus.
synonyms: Gopalan syndrome | burning foot syndrome

name: Vulvar Paget disease
definition: An uncommon intraepithelial malignant neoplasm of eccrine or apocrine origin, arising from the vulva. It usually affects post-menopausal women. In approximately 10-20% of the cases there is an associated anorectal, or urothelial carcinoma or a skin appendage adenocarcinoma identified. It presents as a red, eczematous lesion. Microscopically, it is characterised by the presence of the typical Paget cells which are large, round cells with abundant cytoplasm and prominent nuclei.
synonyms: Extramammary Paget disease of vulva

name: Thromboangiitis obliterans
definition: Thromboangiitis obliterans (TAO), or Buerger's disease, is a segmental occlusive inflammatory condition of arteries and veins, with thrombosis and recanalization of the affected vessels. It is a nonatherosclerotic inflammatory disease affecting small and medium sized arteries and veins of upper and lower extremities. TAO can be distinguished from other types of vasculitis based on its tendency to occur in young male subjects. The etiology and pathogenesis of TAO remains unknown; however, tobacco
synonyms: Buerger disease | endarteritis obliterans

name: Certain parasitic infections or infestations affecting the skin
definition: This group incorporates both localised infestation of the skin by parasites (e.g. cutaneous leishmaniasis) and systemic parasitic infestation with important cutaneous manifestations (e.g. onchodermatitis).

name: Oesophageal varices with bleeding in schistosomiasis
Acute urticaria due to other specified mechanism
definition: Acute urticaria due to an identifiable cause that is not allergy, infection or pseudoallergy

name: Inflammatory bowel disease vasculitis
definition: Inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) can present with associated vasculitis. Cutaneous necrotizing vasculitis can develop as an extraintestinal manifestation of IBD. Cutaneous leukocytoclastic vasculitis can be associated with IBD, but is uncommon.

name: Panniculitis, unspecified, fibula
synonyms: panniculitis of undetermined or unspecified etiology, fibula

name: Primary systemic amyloidosis affecting skin or oral cavity
definition: Primary systemic amyloid, due to abnormal secretion of immunoglobulin light chain fragments as a result of plasma cell dyscrasia or multiple myeloma, may present in the skin. The commonest findings are spontaneous petechial haemorrhages, purpura and bruising. Such haemorrhage has a predilection for skin with clinically apparent amyloid infiltration\: smooth, shiny, waxy, translucent papules and plaques develop, particularly on the eyelids, the neck and in flexural areas. Macroglossia occurs in 1

name: Congenital blepharophimosis, bilateral
definition: This is a congenital condition where the patient has bilateral ptosis with reduced lid size, vertically and horizontally. The nasal bridge is flat and there is hypoplastic orbital rim. Both the vertical and horizontal palpebral fissures (eyelid opening) are shortened. This diagnosis is occurring in both eyes.

name: Diffuse bleeding diathesis due to vitamin K deficient haemorrhagic disease of fetus or newborn, classic
definition: Classic Vitamin K deficiency bleeding after 24 hours to end of the first week of life in infants who have not received prophylactic vitamin K at birth. Bleeding occurs in the umbilicus, GI tract, skin, nose and surgical sites (circumcision)
synonyms: Diffuse bleeding diathesis secondary to vitamin K deficient haemorrhagic disease of fetus and newborn, classic

name: Streptococcal vulvovaginitis
definition: Vulvovaginal infection with group A beta-haemolytic streptococci mainly affecting prepubescent girls and presenting with vulvovaginal erythema, tenderness and soreness.
synonyms: Streptococcal cellulitis of the vulva and vagina

name: Disorders of lips
definition: A group of any derangement or condition affecting the normal structure and function of the lips resulting from developmental or traumatic factors or systemic disease.
synonyms: disorders of lips NOS

name: Complete deficiency of methylmalonyl-CoA mutase
definition: This refers to complete deficiency of an enzyme that catalyzes the isomerization of methylmalonyl-CoA to succinyl-CoA and it is involved in key metabolic pathways. It requires a vitamin B12-derived prosthetic group, adenosylcobalamin, to function.
synonyms: Mutase0 methylmalonic acidaemia | Mutase0 methylmalonic aciduria

name: Hartnup syndrome
definition: Hartnup syndrome is a rare metabolic disorder belonging to the neutral aminoacidurias and characterised by abnormal renal and gastrointestinal transport of neutral amino acids (tryptophan, alanine, asparagine, glutamine, histidine, isoleucine, leucine, phenylalanine, serine, threonine, tyrosine and valine). It can be asymptomatic or present with skin photosensitivity, neurological or psychiatric symptoms.
synonyms: Hartnup disease | Hartnup disorder | Hartnup type aminoaciduria

name: Benign keratinocytic acanthomas
definition: A group of benign discrete epidermal proliferative disorders including seborrhoeic keratosis and clear cell acanthoma.

name: Verrucous epidermal naevus
synonyms: Naevus verrucosus

name: Late syphilitic encephalitis
definition: This is a late, sexually transmitted infection caused by the spirochete bacterium Treponema pallidum subspecies pallidum. This diagnosis is involving acute inflammation of the brain.

name: Late congenital syphilitic interstitial keratitis
definition: This is a late congenital, sexually transmitted infection caused by the spirochete bacterium Treponema pallidum subspecies pallidum. This diagnosis is with interstitial keratitis.
synonyms: congenital syphilitic interstitial keratitis

name: Mucopolysaccharidosis type 1H
definition: Hurler syndrome is the most severe form of mucopolysaccharidosis type 1 (MPS1), a rare lysosomal storage disease, characterised by skeletal deformities and a delay in motor and intellectual development. Patients present within the first year of life with musculoskeletal alterations including short stature, dysostosis multiplex, thoracic-lumbar kyphosis, progressive coarsening of the facial features, cardiomyopathy and valvular abnormalities and progressive cognitive and sensorial deterioration.
synonyms: Hurler syndrome | MPS1H - [Mucopolysaccharidosis type 1H] | Mucopolysaccharidosis type 1, severe form

name: Burn of wrist or hand, deep partial thickness burn
synonyms: Burn of wrist and hand, deep second degree
cn_name: 腕或手深层部分皮层烧伤

name: Infantile haemangioma of liver
definition: This benign vascular tumour (formerly often designated infantile haemangioendothelioma) is the hepatic correlate of infantile haemangioma of the skin. They are usually asymptomatic and may be discovered only as the result of screening infants with multiple cutaneous haemangiomas. These tumours usually involute spontaneously but rarely may cause congestive cardiac failure due to high-volume vascular shunting.
synonyms: Congenital hepatic haemangioma | Infantile hepatic haemangioma

name: Panniculitis, unspecified, toes

name: Animal scabies

Close contact with infested animals (sarcoptic mange) may produce short-lived symptoms of irritation and itch in humans but the mites cannot survive and reproduce in human hosts.

name: Reticular erythematous mucinosis
definition: Reticular erythematous mucinosis comprises areas of reticular infiltrated erythema affecting particularly the upper anterior chest wall. Histologically there is a mucinous and chronic inflammatory cell infiltrate in the dermis. It occurs most frequently in women in middle years of life. The aetiology is not understood though exposure to sunlight may play a part.

name: Late syphilitic bursitis, humerus
synonyms: syphilitic bursitis, humerus

name: Trachomatous conjunctivitis
synonyms: granular conjunctivitis

name: Woolly hair
definition: Woolly hair is a rare congenital abnormality of the structure of the scalp hair marked by extreme kinkiness of the hair.

name: Disseminated cutaneous erysipeloid
definition: Multiple lesions similar to those seen in localised cutaneous erysipeloid (qv) occur disseminated over the body surface. This form is less common than the localised form. Lesions are well-demarcated, violaceous plaques with an advancing border and central clearing.
synonyms: Diffuse cutaneous erysipeloid

name: Frontal fibrosing alopecia
definition: Frontal fibrosing alopecia is an uncommon condition characterised by progressive frontotemporal recession due to inflammatory destruction of hair follicles. Frontal fibrosing alopecia is more common in postmenopausal women, but it can occur in younger women. It may be associated with mucocutaneous lichen planus. Recession of the hair line may progress inexorably over many years but this is not inevitable.
synonyms: Postmenopausal frontal fibrosing alopecia

name: Pelvic varices
definition: The presence of dilated and incompetent ovarian and pelvic veins in women. These may cause no symptoms but may be associated with chronic pelvic pain (pelvic congestion syndrome) or with externally apparent vulvovaginal varicosities.

It is due to an absence of type VII collagen as the result of mutations in the COL7A1 gene.

name: Acute disseminated histoplasmosis capsulati

It is characterised by pulmonary consolidation, enlargement of the liver and spleen, fever, anaemia, loss of appetite and generalised enlargement of lymph glands. Pulmonary manifestations may simulate miliary tuberculosis. Indurated granulomatous ulcers of the mouth, nose and larynx are often present and are distinctive. Progressive emaciation, induced by gastrointestinal

name: Phrynoderma

name: Non-specific cutaneous vascular signs
definition: Changes perceptible in the skin as a result of alterations in blood composition, blood flow or blood vessel integrity. They may be due to local factors or may indicate underlying disorders such as anaemia, hypovolaemia, fever, hypoxia or defective clotting.

definition: Formation of lumps of tonofilaments, which are bundles of keratin filaments. In some but not all epithelia, keratin filaments are conspicuously bundled as tonofilaments. Inside the cell they braid the nucleus, span through the cytoplasm and are attached to the cytoplasmic plaques of the typical epithelial cell-cell junctions, the desmosomes.

Acral lentiginous melanoma starts as a slowly-enlarging flat patch of discolored skin and usually displays a size above 6 mm and often several centimeters or more in diameter upon diagnosis and variable pigmentation with a mixutre of colors including brown, and blue-grey, black and red. synonyms: acral lentiginous melanoma, malignant | malignant acral lentiginous melanoma

name: Angiokeratoma of Mibelli
definition: A type of angiokeratoma that typically presents in women on the dorsa of fingers and toes and multiple dark red papules with a slightly verrucous surface, each measuring about 3-5 mm in diameter.

name: Prominent fingertip pads

definition: A plaque representing a connective-tissue nevus. Connective tissue naevi are uncommon skin lesions that occur when the deeper layers of the skin do not develop correctly or the components of these layers occur in the wrong proportion. Shagreen patches are oval-shaped and nevoid, skin-colored or occasionally pigmented, smooth or crinkled. The word shagreen refers to a type of roughened untanned leather.

definition: The appearance of new skin lesions on previously unaffected skin secondary to trauma. This phenomenon is also termed the isomorphic (from Greek, equal shape) response, given the fact that the new lesions that appear are clinically and histologically identical to the patient's underlying cutaneous disease.

name: Squamous Papilloma

synonyms: Giant pigmented hairy nevus | Giant pigmented mole | Giant pigmented nevus

It is caused by venous hypertension resulting from retrograde flow due to incompetent venous valves, valve destruction, or obstruction of the venous system. Further tissue changes arise from an inflammatory process mediated by metalloproteinases, which are up-regulated by ferric ion from extravasated red blood cells. Stasis dermatitis presents initially as poorly demarcated erythematous plaques of the lower legs bilaterally, classically involving t
synonyms: Varicose eczema | Venous eczema

name: Abnormality of the palmar creases

name: Angiokeratoma

synonyms: Angiokeratomas | Angiokeratoma of skin | Cutaneous Angiokeratoma | skin angiokeratoma

name: Nevus roseus
definition: A variant of port-wine stain characterized by a pale red or even pink tone, in contrast to the darker hue of the port-wine stain. By analogy with the term port-wine stain, this variant rose-wine stain, or nevus roseus. Nevus roseus, however, cannot be definitely diagnosed until adulthood as port-wine stains are sometimes pink in children. While the natural history of port-wine stains includes hypertrophy, darkening, and nodularity, nevus roseus remains unchanged for life.

definition: A cut or injury to the soft tissue under the fingernail or toenail.

name: Cobblestone-like hyperkeratosis
definition: The presence of verrucous, cobblestone-like papules and nodules in a region of skin that is said to have an appearance like that of cobblestones.

name: Exanthem
definition: A widespread rash.

name: Nevus flammeus
definition: A congenital vascular malformation consisting of superficial and deep dilated capillaries in the skin which produce a reddish to purplish discolouration of the skin.
synonyms: Nevus simplex | port-wine stain

name: Reduced plantar creases
definition: The creases (wrinkles) on the soles of the feet are less pronounced than normal, or absent.

name: Xanthomas of the palmar creases
definition: The presence of multiple xanthomas (xanthomata) in the skin distributed in the creases of the palm of the hand. Xanthomas are yellowish, firm, lipid-laden nodules in the skin.
synonyms: Xanthoma palmare striatum | Xanthoma striatum palmare

name: Absent dermoepidermal hemidesmosomes
definition: Lack of demonstrable hemidesmosomes at the dermoepidermal junction. Hemidesmosomes are the specialized junctional complexes, that contribute to the attachment of epithelial cells to the underlying basement membrane in stratified and other complex epithelia, such as the skin.

name: Majocchi's granuloma
definition: Majocchi's granuloma (MG) is an inflammatory and granulomatous, dermatophytic infection characterized by a granulomatous inflammation around the hair follicle. Histopathologically, MG demonstrates a nodular perifollicular granulomatous infiltrate of lymphoid cells, macrophages, epithelioid cells, multinucleated giant cells, and neutrophils. Unlike superficial dermatophytoses, fungal hyphae and spores can be detected not only on the surface of the epidermis but also within or around the hair foll
synonyms: Deep seated dermatophytosis | Granuloma trichophyticum | Majocchi's granuloma

name: Skin vesicle
definition: A circumscribed, fluid-containing, epidermal elevation less than 10mm in diameter at the widest point that (i) Contain serous exudates or serum mixed with blood or pus; (ii) Are discrete, grouped, irregularly distributed, or linear as in Rhus dermatitis; (iii) Are short-lived. Vesicles may break spontaneously or evolve into bullae by enlarging or coalescing with other vesicles.

name: Thickened elastic fibers in the dermis
definition: An increase of the diameter of elastic fibers in the dermis.
synonyms: Thickened elastic fibres in the dermis

name: Abnormality of hair pigmentation
definition: An abnormality of hair pigmentation (color).
synonyms: Abnormality of hair color | Abnormality of hair colour | Abnormality of hair pigmentation

name: Papillary dermal edema
definition: Swelling due to fluid acculuation of the papillary dermis.

name: Soft, doughy skin
definition: A skin texture that is unusually soft (and may feel silky), and has a malleable consistency resembling that of dough.
synonyms: Soft, doughy skin

name: Anhidrosis
definition: Inability to sweat.
synonyms: Anhydrosis | Lack of sweating | Sudomotor dysfunction | Sweating dysfunction | absence of sweating | Adiaphoresis

name: Auspitz sign
definition: The appearance of small bleeding points after successive layers of scale have been removed from the surface of psoriatic papules or plaques.

name: Recurrent cutaneous fungal infections
definition: Increased susceptibility to cutaneous fungal infections, as manifested by recurrent episodes of cutaneous fungal infections.

name: Shoulder dimple
definition: A subtype of skin dimples occurring in the shoulder region.
synonyms: Acromial dimple | Bi-acromial dimples | Shoulder dimples

name: Pretibial dimple
definition: A groove or crease on the shins (pretibial, i.e., over the shin bone). Pretibial creases may be obvious at birth and may range from 3 cm to over 15 cm in length and lengthen as the limb grows. They appear as an elongated dimple because of the attachment of skin to underlying tissue (e.g., to the tibia). The dimple or crease grows in proportion to the growth of the leg.

name: Ectopic cilia of eyelid
definition: An eyelash that emerges from the underside (conjunctiva) of the upper or lower eyelid.

name: Absent skin pigmentation
definition: Lack of skin pigmentation (coloring).
synonyms: Absent skin pigmentation | Lack of skin coloration

name: Tongue telangiectasia
definition: Telangiectasia (that is, the presence of small dilated superficial blood vessels) of the tongue.
synonyms: Angioectasias of the tongue | Lingual angioectasias | Lingual telangiectasia | Spider veins of the tongue

name: Abnormality of the integument
definition: An abnormality of the integument, which consists of the skin and the superficial fascia.

name: Nailfold capillary tortuosity
definition: An increased number of turns of the blood vessels of the nailfold with a charactereistic winded or twisted appearance of the blood vessels.

name: Nevus
definition: A nevus is a type of hamartoma that is a circumscribed stable malformation of the skin.
synonyms: Mole | Naevi | Naevus | Nevi

name: Flexural lichenification
definition: Lichenification affecting primarily flexural areas of the skin.
synonyms: Lichenification in skin folds

name: Palmoplantar hypohidrosis
definition: Decreased sweating on the palms and soles.

name: Livedo reticularis
definition: Livedo reticularis is characterized by the presence of a bluish purple, mottled or netlike pattern in unbroken circles on the skin. Exposure to cold environments usually intensifies the vascular pattern. Presumably, the condition results from slow or stagnant blood flow, vessel-wall pathology, and decreased oxygen tension.

name: Bronchial telangiectasia
definition: Telangiectasias (small dilated blood vessels located near the surface of the skin or mucous membranes) located in the trachoebronchial system.
synonyms: Endobronchial telangiectasia

name: Invasive dermatophyte infection
definition: Infection that extends deeply into the dermis by dermatophytes, fungi that typically cause different types of superficial infection (tinea) or skin, hair, or nails.

name: Sparse anterior scalp hair
definition: Decreased number of head hairs per unit area on the anterior region of the scalp.
synonyms: Sparse scalp hair at front of head | Thin scalp hair at front of head

name: Progressive hypotrichosis
definition: Progressively reduced or lacking hair growth.

name: White forelock
definition: A triangular depigmented region of white hairs located in the anterior midline of the scalp.
synonyms: Poliosis of anterior hair | Poliosis of forelock hair | White part of hair above forehead

name: Abnormality of upper eyelashes
synonyms: Abnormality of upper eyelashes

name: Perioral radial furrowing
definition: The presence of radial grooves in the skin surrounding the mouth (see Figure 4 of PMID:27833976).

name: Palmoplantar hyperkeratosis
definition: Abnormal thickening of the skin localized to the palm of the hand and the sole of the foot.
synonyms: Hyperkeratosis of palms and soles | Hyperkeratosis of the palms and soles | Palmoplantar keratoses | Palmoplantar keratosis | Thick palms and soles | Thickened palms and soles | Thickening of the outer layer of the skin of the palms and soles

name: Cutaneous telangiectasia
definition: Dilated blood vessels on the skin.

name: Eruptive vellus hair cyst
definition: A cutaneous cyst that is small (one or two millimeters in diameter) and painless, presenting as a follicular papule that usually is skin colored but may have a reddish or brownish tinge.

name: Redundant skin on fingers
definition: Loose and sagging skin of the fingers.
synonyms: Extra skin on fingers

name: Pustular rash
definition: A rash composed of pustular lesions. A pustule is defined as a vesicle or bulla containing purulent material. It varies in size and may occur at different levels within the epidermis: subcorneal, intraepidermal, or basement membrane zones. The pustules may or may not be sterile and are normally filled with neutrophils.
synonyms: Pustulosis

name: Connective tissue nevi
definition: Connective tissue nevi are hamartomas in which one or several components of the dermis is altered.

name: Aplasia of the sweat glands
definition: Absence of the sweat glands.
synonyms: Absent sweat glands | Lack of sweat glands

name: Heterotopic dermal ossification
definition: Formation of abnormal, extraskeletal bony tissue in the dermis (i.e., the layer of skin that lies beneath the epidermis and above the subcutaneous layer).

name: Cardiac neurofibroma
definition: A neurofibroma (benign peripheral nerve sheath tumor) localized in the heart.

name: Abnormal cutaneous elastic fiber morphology
definition: Any structural anomaly of the elastic fibers of the skin. Elastic fibers are the essential extracellular matrix macromolecules comprising an elastin core surrounded by a mantle of fibrillin-rich microfibrils.
synonyms: Abnormal cutaneous elastic fibre morphology

name: Onychoheterotopia
definition: Growth of nail tissue outside the ungual plate, generally in the finger.
synonyms: Ectopic fingernail

name: Serpiginous cutaneous lesion
definition: A skin lesion with a snake- or serpent-like distribution.
synonyms: Serpiginous eruption

name: Superficial dermal perivascular inflammatory infiltrate
definition: Numerous lymphocytes surrounding blood vessels in the superficial part of the dermis.
synonyms: Superficial perivascular inflammatory infiltrate

name: Heliotrope rash
definition: In a heliotrope rash, the color of the skin turns to violet, which is the color of the heliotrope flower.
synonyms: Heliotrope erythema

name: Squamous cell carcinoma of the skin
definition: Squamous cell carcinoma of the skin is a malignant tumor of squamous epithelium.
synonyms: Squamous skin carcinoma

name: Redundant skin
definition: Loose and sagging skin often associated with loss of skin elasticity.
synonyms: Loose redundant skin | Redundant skin folds | Sagging, redundant skin

name: Squamous cell carcinoma
definition: The presence of squamous cell carcinoma of the skin.
synonyms: Squamous cell cancer

name: Peripheral cyanosis
definition: Bluish discoloration of the distal extremities in the absence of cold temperature or stress. Peripheral cyanosis can involve hands, fingertips, or toes, and sometimes circumoral and periorbital areas. Mucous membranes are generally not involved.

name: Aplasia cutis congenita on trunk or limbs
definition: A developmental defect resulting in the congenital absence of skin on the trunk or the limbs.

name: Chronic intestinal candidiasis
definition: Persistent overgrowth of Candida albicans in the gastrointestinal tract.
synonyms: Candida overgrowth syndrome

name: Facial papilloma
synonyms: Facial verruca | Facial wart

name: Aplasia cutis congenita of midline scalp vertex
Sparse eyebrow
definition: Decreased density/number of eyebrow hairs.
synonyms: Hypotrichosis of eyebrow | Sparse eyebrow | Sparse eyebrows

name: Cyst of the eyelid
synonyms: Cyst of the eyelid | Eyelid bump | Eyelid mass | Lesion of the eyelid

name: Pyoderma
definition: Any manifestation of a skin disease associated with the production of pus.
synonyms: Pus-filled lesion

name: Skin rash
definition: A red eruption of the skin.
synonyms: Rash | Skin rash

name: Dermal translucency
definition: An abnormally increased ability of the skin to permit light to pass through (translucency) such that subcutaneous structures such as veins display an increased degree of visibility.
synonyms: Translucent skin

name: Contact dermatitis
definition: An inflammatory process in skin caused by an exogenous agent that directly or indirectly injure the skin. If the offending agent is identified and removed, the eruption will resolve. An unusual or patterned eruption may be a clue to the presence of a contact dermatitis. Patch testing may be helpful in the differential diagnosis.
synonyms: Contact dermatitis/eczema | Contact eczema | dermatitis venenata | Dermatitis, venenata

name: Superficial spreading melanoma
definition: A type of melanoma that is flat and irregular in shape and color, with different shades of black and brown.

name: Hyperpigmentation in sun-exposed areas
synonyms: Hyperpigmentation of exposed areas | Increased pigmentation in sun-exposed areas

name: Generalized keratosis follicularis
synonyms: Generalised keratosis follicularis

name: Short nail
definition: Decreased length of nail.
synonyms: Short nail | Short nails

name: Lichenoid skin lesion
definition: Multiple skin lesions resembling those characteristic of the disease lichen planus. These lesions are violaceous (reddish-purple), shiny, isolated, flat-topped papules and plaques.

name: Orthokeratosis
definition: Formation of an anuclear keratin layer

name: Keratinocyte vacuolization
definition: Increased number of vacuoles (membrane-bound organelles that areempty of cytoplasm, lined with a membrane, and filled with fluid) in keratinocytes.
synonyms: Keratinocyte vacuolation | Vacuolated keratinocytes

name: Vasculitis in the skin
definition: A type of vasculitis (inflammation of blood vessel walls) that affects skeletal muscle tissue.
synonyms: Cutaneous vasculitis

name: Multiple cutaneous leiomyomas
definition: The presence of multiple leiomyomas of the skin.

name: Nummular eczema
definition: A type of eczema characterized by pruritic coin-shaped patches on the skin. Nummular eczema most commonly occurs on the extremities, particularly the legs, but may occur anywhere on the trunk, hands, or feet
synonyms: Discoid eczema | Nummular dermatitis

name: Tiger tail banding
definition: An abnormal appearance of hair under polarizing microscopy (using crossed polarizers), whereby hair shafts show striking alternating bright and dark bands, often referred to as tiger tail banding.
synonyms: Tiger tail banding | Tiger-tail banding

name: Fine hair
definition: Hair that is fine or thin to the touch.
synonyms: Fine hair | Fine hair shaft | Fine hair texture | Thin hair | Thin hair shaft | Thin hair texture | Thinned hair

name: Sacral dimple
definition: A cutaneous indentation resulting from tethering of the skin to underlying structures (bone) of the intergluteal cleft.
synonyms: Pilonidal dimple | Spinal dimple

name: Periorbital wrinkles
synonyms: Excess periorbital skin wrinkling | Periorbital rhytids | Periorbital wrinkling | Wrinkles around the eyes

name: Mechanic's hands
definition: Mechanic's hands are fissured, erythematous, hyperkeratotic eruptions on the hands, resembling the type of occupational dermatosis said to resemble the hands of a manual laborer. The lesions are classically on the lateral edges of the fingers and thumbs, largely sparing the palmar, and dorsal aspects of the digits.

name: Linear nevus sebaceous
definition: A type of nevus sebaceous with a linear form, raised borders and yellowish color.

name: Prolonged neonatal jaundice
definition: Neonatal jaundice refers to a yellowing of the skin and other tissues of a newborn infant as a result of increased concentrations of bilirubin in the blood. Neonatal jaundice affects over half of all newborns to some extent in the first week of life. Prolonged neonatal jaundice is said to be present if the jaundice persists for longer than 14 days in term infants and 21 days in preterm infants.
synonyms: Jaundice, neonatal | Neonatal jaundice | Prolonged yellowing of skin in newborn

name: Malalignment of the great toenail
definition: A lateral deviation of the nail plate of the great toe along the longitudinal axis due to the lateral rotation of the nail matrix. The nail plate grows out in ridges.

name: Reduced subcutaneous adipose tissue
definition: A reduced amount of fat tissue in the lowest layer of the integument. This feature can be appreciated by a reduced skinfold thickness.
synonyms: Decreased subcutaneous adipose tissue | Decreased subcutaneous fat | Reduced fat tissue below the skin | Reduced subcutaneous fat | Scanty adipose tissue

name: Bruising susceptibility
definition: An ecchymosis (bruise) refers to the skin discoloration caused by the escape of blood into the tissues from ruptured blood vessels. This term refers to an abnormally increased susceptibility to bruising. The corresponding phenotypic abnormality is generally elicited on medical history as a report of frequent ecchymoses or bruising without adequate trauma.
synonyms: Bruisability | Bruise easily | Bruising susceptibility | Easy bruisability | Easy bruising

name: Congenital abnormal hair pattern
definition: A congenital abnormality of the distribution of hair growth.
synonyms: Abnormal hair pattern since birth

name: Seborrheic dermatitis
definition: Seborrheic dermatitis is a form of eczema which is closely related to dandruff. It causes dry or greasy peeling of the scalp, eyebrows, and face, and sometimes trunk.
synonyms: Dysseborrheic dermatitis | Seborrhea | Seborrheic eczema | seborrhea | Seborrhoeic dermatitis | Seborrhoeic eczema | SKIN SEBORRHEIC

name: Solitary angiokeratoma
definition: A dark, keratotic papule about 2-10 mm in diameter, usually occurring on the lower extremeities. Usually the lesions begin as bright, soft, and nonkeratotic paules which grow larger and change to a firm, blue to black and keratotic stage.

name: Spider hemangioma
definition: A form of telangiectasis characterized by a central elevated red dot the size of a pinhead, representing an arteriole, with numerous small blood vessels that radiate out thereby resembling the legs of a spider. Characteristically, compression of the central arteriole causes the entire lesion to blanch, and the lesion quickly refills once the compression is released.

name: Lower eyelid erythema
definition: Redness of the skin of the lower eyelid, caused by hyperemia of the capillaries in the lower layers of the skin.

name: Thin eyebrow
definition: Decreased diameter of eyebrow hairs.
synonyms: Thin eyebrow | Thin eyebrows

name: Harlequin phenomenon
definition: The Harlequin phenomenon consists of a sudden change in skin color, resulting in two different body colors, one on each half of the body.

name: Trachyonychia
definition: Excessive longitudinal ridging that gives the surface of the nail plate a rough appearance. It results from multiple foci of defective keratinization of the proximal nail matrix.

name: Increased groin pigmentation with raindrop depigmentation
Abnormal keratinocyte morphology
definition: Any structural anomaly of the keratinocyte. The keratinocyte is the major cell type of the epidermis and is responsible for generating the protective barrier.

name: Maceration
definition: A softening and breaking down of skin resulting from prolonged exposure to moisture. Macerated skin becomes soft and wrinkly and takes on a whitish hue.
synonyms: Maceration of the skin | Skin maceration

name: Flexural reticulate hyperpigmentation
definition: Hyperpigmented macules with a reticulate (net-like) pattern involving the neck, axillae, groins, and other flexures like the inframammary folds in females. Histopathology shows orthokeratosis or hyperkeratosis, thinning of the suprapapillary epithelium, elongation of the rete ridges, hyperpigmentation of the basal layer, and follicular cysts. A perivascular lymphohistiocytic infiltrate can be observed in the papillary dermis.
synonyms: Reticular pigmented anomaly of the flexures | Reticulate hyperpigmentation of the flexures

name: Cylindroma
definition: A benign skin adnexal tumor of eccrine differentiation.

name: Hyperconvex nail
definition: When viewed on end (with the digit tip pointing toward the examiner's eye) the curve of the nail forms a tighter curve of convexity.
synonyms: Increased nail curvature | Nail overcurvature

name: Splinter hemorrhages
definition: Thin, red to reddish-brown lines of blood (hemorrhages) under the nails. Splinter hemorrhages run vertically under the nails.

name: Abnormal toenail morphology
definition: An anomaly of the toenail.
synonyms: Abnormality of the toenail | Abnormality of the toenails

name: Short lower eyelashes
synonyms: Decreased length of lower eyelashes | Short lower eyelashes

name: Circumungual hyperkeratosis
definition: A thickening of the stratum corneum, the outer layer of the skin, in the region surrounding the nails.
synonyms: Thick skin around nails

name: Palmoplantar cutis gyrata
definition: Cutis gyrata of palms and soles.
synonyms: Cutis gyrata of palms and soles

name: Erysipelas
definition: Increased susceptibility to erysipelas, as manifested by a medical history of repeated episodes of erysipelas, which is a superficial infection of the skin, typically involving the lymphatic system.
synonyms: St. Anthony's Fire

name: Subungual fibromas
definition: The presence of fibromata beneath finger or toenails.
synonyms: Subungual fibroma

name: Hypopigmentation of hair
synonyms: Hair hypopigmentation | Loss of hair color | Loss of hair colour

name: Acute cutaneous wound
definition: A cutaneous wound that is proceeding through an orderly and timely reparative process that results in sustained restoration of the anatomic and functional integrity of the skin.

name: Hypohidrosis or hyperhidrosis
synonyms: Lack of sweating or excessive sweating

name: Dermoid cyst
definition: A congenital subcutaneous cyst that arises from entrapment of skin along the lines of embryonic fusion. In contrast to epidermal cysts, dermoid cysts tend to contain various adnexal structures such as hair, sebaceous, eccrine or apocrine glands. Dermoid cysts are present at birth, and are indolent, firm, deep, subcutaneous nodules. They are often located on the head and neck, and rarely in the anogenital area. Dermoid cysts are slowly progressive and can grow to a size of 1 to 4 cm.

name: Slow-growing hair
definition: Hair whose growth is slower than normal.
synonyms: Delayed hair growth | Poor hair growth | Slow growing hair | Slow rate of hair growth | Slow speed of hair growth | Slow-growing hair

name: Beau's lines
definition: A nail dystrophy that is preseents as grooved lines that run from side to side on the fingernail or the toenail that may look like indentations or ridges on the nail plate. They are caused by temporary disruption in the growth of proximal nail matrix. Trauma is usually the initiating factor such as infections, severe medical illnesses, major surgery/anesthesia, medication side effects, and autoimmune disease.
synonyms: Beau lines | Ladder nail | Ladder nail sign

name: Aplastic/hypoplastic toenail
definition: Absence or underdevelopment of the toenail.
synonyms: Absent/small toenails | Absent/underdeveloped toenails | Aplastic/hypoplastic toenails | Hypoplastic-absent toenails

name: Differential cyanosis
definition: Differential degree of bluish discoloration between the upper and lower extremities.

name: Orthokeratotic hyperkeratosis
definition: A form of hyperkeratosis characterized by thickening of the cornified layer without retained nuclei.

name: Albinism
definition: An abnormal reduction in the amount of pigmentation (reduced or absent) of skin, hair and eye (iris and retina).
synonyms: Achromasia | Albinism

name: Hyperextensible skin of chest
synonyms: Hyperelastic chest skin | Stretchable chest skin

name: Absent hair
synonyms: Absent hair

name: Generalized scaling
definition: Desquamation (scaling) involving nearly all of the surface of the skin.
synonyms: Diffuse desquamation | Diffuse scaling

name: Eschar
definition: A type of wound characterized by dry, black, hard necrotic tissue.
synonyms: Black eschar | Black spot | Tache noire

name: Commissural lip pit
definition: A depression located at an oral commissure.
synonyms: Commissural labial pits | Commissural pit | Lip pits at corners of the mouth | Pits at the corners of the lips

name: Porokeratosis
definition: A clonal disorder of keratinization with one or multiple atrophic patches surrounded by a clinically and histologically distinctive hyperkeratotic ridgelike border called the cornoid lamella.
synonyms: disseminated superficial actinic porokeratosis

name: Abnormality of the pubic hair
definition: Abnormality of the growth of the pubic hair. Pubic hair is part of the secondary sexual hair, which normally ensues during puberty.
synonyms: Abnormality of the pubic hair

name: Spotty hyperpigmentation
synonyms: Patchy hyperpigmentation | Spotty increased pigmentation

name: Cystic acne
definition: A severe type of acne characterized by the formation of cysts enclosing a mixture of keratin and sebum.

name: Absent pigmentation of the limbs
definition: Lack of skin pigmentation (coloring) of the arms and legs.

name: Diffuse palmoplantar hyperkeratosis
definition: Diffuse abnormal thickening of the skin on the palms and soles.
synonyms: Diffuse palmoplantar keratoderma | Hyperkeratosis, diffuse palmoplantar

name: Cutaneous photosensitivity
definition: An increased sensitivity of the skin to light. Photosensitivity may result in a rash upon exposure to the sun (which is known as photodermatosis). Photosensitivity can be diagnosed by phototests in which light is shone on small areas of skin.
synonyms: Photosensitive skin | Photosensitive skin rashes | Photosensitivity | Sensitivity to sunlight | Skin photosensitivity | Sun sensitivity

name: Steatocystoma multiplex
definition: Multiple, localized or widespread, asymptomatic or inflammatory dermal cysts involving the pilosebaceous units. Lesions can appear anywhere on the body, but steatocystoma multiplex is more commonly involved with those areas of the skin with a high density of developed pilosebaceous units (e.g., the axilla, groin, neck, and proximal extremities).
synonyms: multiple sebaceous cysts | sebocystomatosis

name: Loss of eyelashes
definition: This term refers to the loss of eyelashes that were previously present.
synonyms: Ciliary Madarosis | Eyelashes fell out | Loss of eyelashes | Milphosis | Missing eyelashes

name: Leukonychia
definition: White discoloration of the nails.
synonyms: White discoloration of nails

name: Confetti hypopigmentation pattern of lower leg skin
synonyms: Confetti hypopigmentation pattern of lower leg skin

name: Deep longitudinal plantar crease
definition: Narrow, paramedian longitudinal depressions in the plantar skin of the forefoot.
synonyms: Foot crease | Longitudinal groove on soles

name: Narrow nail
definition: Decreased width of nail.
synonyms: Narrow nail

name: Spongiosis
definition: Spongiosis refers to the increased intercellular edema in the epidermis resulting in the pulling away of the keratinocytes from their surrounding desmosomes. Histologically, the spongiotic tissue reaction pattern involves the accumulation of fluid in the intercellular spaces of the epidermis, making the desmosomes junctions more easy to appreciate. Parakeratosis forms above the areas of spongiosis. The foci of spongiosis can be microscopic to grossly identifiable clinically with vesicles or bull

name: Premature skin wrinkling
definition: The presence of an increased degree of wrinkling (irregular folds and indentations) of the skin as compared with age-related norms.
synonyms: Premature skin wrinkling | Wrinkled skin

name: Hypopigmentation of the skin
definition: A reduction of skin color related to a decrease in melanin production and deposition.
synonyms: Hypopigmentation | Hypopigmented skin | Patchy lightened skin | Skin hypopigmentation

name: Prominent superficial veins
definition: A condition in which superficial veins (i.e., veins just under the skin) are more conspicuous or noticeable than normal.
synonyms: Marked subcutaneous veins | Prominent veins

name: Hockey-stick palmar crease
definition: An abnormality of the upper palmar crease whereby the crease widens and ends between the second and third fingers and is said to resemble a hockey stick.
synonyms: Hockey-stick crease

name: Aplasia/Hypoplasia of the eyebrow
definition: Absence or underdevelopment of the eyebrow.
synonyms: Absence of eyebrow | Agenesis of eyebrow | Hypotrophic eyebrow | Lack of eyebrow | Missing eyebrow | Sparse or absent eyebrows | Sparse to absent eyebrows | Sparse/absent eyebrows

name: Furuncle
definition: An infection of a hair follicle that extends subcutaneously, forming an abscess.
synonyms: Boil

name: Dry hair
definition: Hair that lacks the luster (shine or gleam) of normal hair.
synonyms: Dry hair

name: White scaling skin
synonyms: White scaling skin | White scaly skin

name: Plantar edema
definition: An abnormal accumulation of fluid beneath the skin on sole of the foot.
synonyms: Plantar oedema

name: Reduced epidermal plectin protein expression
synonyms: Skin biopsy: plectin antibody staining abnormal or absent

name: Perioral eczema
definition: A type of eczema that occurs in the lips and perioral area.
synonyms: Eczema around the mouth

name: Hypogranulosis
definition: The height (thickness) of the stratum granulosum of the epidermis (granular layer) is below the lower limit of normal but the stratum granulosum is visible.
synonyms: Diminished granular layer | Reduced granular layer

name: Pseudo-chilblains on fingers
definition: Inflammatory chilblain-like nodules on the hands and/or fingers.
synonyms: COVID finger | COVID fingers

name: Alopecia totalis
definition: Loss of all scalp hair.
synonyms: Total alopecia

name: Patchy stratum granulosum of epidermis
definition: The stratum granulosum of the epidermis (granular layer) displays areas of discontinuity.
synonyms: Patchy granular layer of the skin

name: Hypertrichosis
definition: Hypertrichosis is increased hair growth that is abnormal in quantity or location.
synonyms: Excessive hair growth | Increased hair growth on body

name: Abnormal nail growth
definition: Nail whose growth pattern or speed deviates from normal.

name: Numerous nevi
synonyms: Multiple pigmented nevi | Numerous moles

name: Spinal neurofibroma
definition: A neurofibroma (benign peripheral nerve sheath tumor) localized in the spine.
synonyms: Spinal neurofibromas

name: Subcutaneous neurofibroma
definition: A neurofibroma (benign peripheral nerve sheath tumor) localized in the subcutis (subcutaneous region).

name: Morbilliform rash
definition: An exanthema consisting of widespread pink-to-red macules (flat spots of 2-10 mm in diameter) or papules (red bumps) that blanch with pressure. The macules and papules may cluster and merge to form sheets over several days.

name: Facial cyanosis
definition: Bluish discoloration of one or more regions of the face.
synonyms: Bluish face | Cyanotic face

name: Plantar hyperkeratosis
definition: Hyperkeratosis affecting the sole of the foot.
synonyms: Plantar hyperkeratoses

name: Generalized bronze hyperpigmentation
synonyms: Bronze skin | Generalised bronze hyperpigmentation

name: Regional abnormality of skin
definition: An abnormality of the skin that is restricted to a particular body region.

name: Acanthosis nigricans
definition: A dermatosis characterized by thickened, hyperpigmented plaques, typically on the intertriginous surfaces and neck.
synonyms: Darkened and thickened skin | Keratosis nigricans | keratosis nigricans

name: Large clumps of pigment irregularly distributed along hair shaft
synonyms: Large clumps of pigment irregularly distributed along hair shaft

name: Dermatographic urticaria
definition: An exaggerated whealing tendency when the skin is stroked, that is, formation of red, itchy bumps and lines on the skin as a result of pressure on the skin (for instance, stroking the skin with a pen or tongue depressor).
synonyms: Dermatographism | Dermographism | Skin writing | dermatographic urticaria | dermographism

name: Generalized hyperkeratosis
synonyms: Generalised hyperkeratosis | Hyperkeratosis, generalised | Hyperkeratosis, generalized

name: Clumping of elastic fibers in the dermis
definition: Formation of clumps or aggregates that make up small protuberances from elastic fibers within the dermis (especially the reticular dermis).
synonyms: Clumping of elastic fibres in the dermis

name: Hyperextensible skin

definition: Eosinophilic hyaline ovoid bodies which are often found in the subepidermal papillary regions or sometimes in the epidermis. They are known as CBs (in epithelium/epidermis), colloid bodies, or hyaline bodies (in connective tissue). They are 10-25 micrometers in diameter and situated mostly within o
synonyms: Colloid bodies | Colloid bodies of Civatte | Cytoid bodies | Hyaline bodies

name: Absent stratum granulosum of epidermis

name: Subcutaneous hemorrhage

name: Abnormality of skin physiology

name: Lip cyanosis

name: Carbuncle

name: Frontotemporal hypertrichosis

name: Abnormal nail surface

name: Superficial blush-like subcutaneous fatty lesions

name: Abnormal eyebrow morphology
definition: An abnormality of the eyebrow.
synonyms: Abnormality of the eyebrow

name: Irregularly shaped keratohyaline granules
definition: Abnormal shape of keratohyaline granules in dermal keratinocytes.

name: Bifid nail
definition: A digit with two nails, with at least some soft tissue between them.
synonyms: duplicated nail | Notched nail

name: Cutaneous mastocytosis

name: Peripheral schwannoma

name: Paramedian lip pit
definition: Depression located paramedially on the vermilion of a lip.
synonyms: Paramedian labial pits

name: Abnormal dermoepidermal hemidesmosome morphology

name: Absent eyelashes

synonyms: Absent eyelashes | Agenesis of eyelashes | Aplasia of eyelashes | Atrichia of eyelashes | Failure of development of eyelashes

name: Deep palmar crease

The scales may peel or desquamate, rather like old, sun-baked blistered paint, often with areas of underlying hypopigmentation. This has led to the terms peeling paint or flaky paint dermatosis (See the Figure in PMID:24285001).
synonyms: Flaky paint skin appearance

name: Forehead hyperpigmentation
synonyms: Darkening of the forehead

name: Trichodysplasia

name: Thin fingernail

Epidermoid cyst
definition: Nontender, round and firm, but slightly compressible, intradermal or subcutaneous cyst measuring 0.5-5 cm in diameter. Epidermal cysts are intradermal or subcutaneous tumors, grow slowly and occur on the face, neck, back and scrotum. They usually appear at or around puberty, and as a rule an affected individual has one solitary or a few cysts. A central, dark comedone opening (punctum) may be present.

name: Hypopigmented skin patches

Electron microscopy may show flat, oval hair shafts with reduced transversal diameter.

Erythema marginatum tends to affect the trunk more than the extremities and to not be accompanied by pruritus.

name: Long eyelashes in irregular rows
synonyms: Long eyelashes in irregular rows

name: Sydney crease

name: Aplasia cutis congenita over posterior parietal area

synonyms: Hyperelastic face skin | Stretchable face skin

name: Linear arrays of macular hyperkeratoses in flexural areas

definition: Hordeola interna are acute purulent infections affecting the meibomian sebacious glands, often caused by staphylococcus infections. In contrast to chalazia (chronic epithelioid cell granulomatous inflammation of the meibomian gland caused by inflammation of a blocked meibomian gland), hordeola are extremely painfull and can cause extreme local swelling.
synonyms: Red bump on inner eyelid | Stye of inner eyelid

name: Absent dermal elastic fibers

name: Acquired abnormal hair pattern

name: Slow-growing scalp hair
definition: Scalp hair whose growth is slower than normal.

name: Sparse axillary hair
definition: Reduced number or density of axillary hair.

name: Fragile skin

definition: Trichorrhexis nodosa is the formation of nodes along the hair shaft through which breakage readily occurs. It is thus a focal defect in the hair fiber that is characterized by thickening or weak points (nodes) that cause the hair to break off easily. The result is defective, abnormally fragile hair.

name: Deep-set nails

ESFA stains positively with epithelial membrane antigen (EMA) and carcinoembryonic antigen (CEA).

synonyms: Epidermal hyperkeratosis

name: Onychogryphosis of fingernail
definition: Thickened fingernails.
synonyms: Overgrowth and curving of fingernail

name: Small nail
definition: A nail that is diminished in length and width, i.e., underdeveloped nail.
synonyms: Hypoplastic nail | Hypoplastic nails | Nail hypoplasia | Small nail | Small nails

name: Mucosal telangiectasiae
definition: Telangiectasia of the mucosa, the mucous membranes which are involved in absorption and secretion that line cavities that are exposed to the external environment and internal organs.

synonyms: Fragmented elastic fibres in the dermis

name: Cutaneous melanoma
definition: The presence of a melanoma of the skin.

name: Facial flushing after alcohol intake
synonyms: Facial flushing after alcohol intake

name: Areas of hypopigmentation and hyperpigmentation that do not follow Blaschko lines
Skin nodule

name: Alopecia of scalp
synonyms: Absence of scalp hair | Baldness | Missing scalp hair | Pathologic hair loss from scalp | Scalp hair loss

name: Angiokeratoma circumscriptum naeviforme
definition: A type of angiokeratoma that typically presents in childhood as a large, mostly linear and unilateral hyperkeratotic plaque which is composed of confluent keratotic papules. The size ranges from a few centimeters up to a major part of the body surface. Initially the lesions present as multiple reddish macules, clinically similar to a nevus flammeus. Within several years they develop into acanthokeratotic papules that agrregate into plaques which may have a hyperkeratotic surface.

name: Increased number of skin folds
synonyms: Increased number of skin folds

name: Abnormality of hair texture
definition: An abnormality of the texture of the hair.
synonyms: Abnormality of hair consistency | Abnormality of hair curl pattern | Abnormality of hair texture | Abnormality of hair volume

name: Positive probe-to-bone test
definition: An abnormal result of the probe-to-bone (PTB) test. The PTB test is performed by inserting a sterile, metal surgical probe into the ulcer and is positive if a hard, gritty surface is felt inside. For large wounds, this may require gentle exploration of the wound with the probe.
synonyms: Abnormal probe-to-bone test

name: Toenail dysplasia
definition: An abnormality of the development of the toenails.
synonyms: Abnormal toenail development | Dysplastic toenails

name: Longitudinal erythronychia
definition: A longitudinal red band extending from the proximal nail fold or lunula to the distal nail plate.

name: Extension of eyebrows towards upper eyelid
definition: The eyebrows extend towards - or even all the way down to - the margin of the upper eyelid.
synonyms: Extension of eyebrows towards upper eyelid

name: Trichoepithelioma
definition: A benign hair follicle tumor whose tumor cells form rudimentary hair follicles but not actual hair shafts. A trichoepithelioma is usually less than one centimeter, firm, round, and shihy with yellow, pink, brown, or bluish color. They may occur multiply, usually on the face, and may gradually increase in number with age.

name: Perioral erythema
definition: Erythema (Redness of the skin caused by hyperemia of the capillaries in the lower layers of the skin) localized to the region surrounding the mouth.

name: Multiple cafe-au-lait spots
definition: The presence of six or more cafe-au-lait spots.
synonyms: Multiple birthmarks | Multiple flat light-brown marks on skin

name: Sawtooth acanthosis
definition: A type of epidermal acanthosis characterized by a jagged (sawtooth) appearance of the rete ridges of the epidermis.
synonyms: Sawtoothed acanthosis

name: Ichthyosis
definition: An abnormality of the skin characterized the presence of excessive amounts of dry surface scales on the skin resulting from an abnormality of keratinization.
synonyms: Hypertrophic ichthyosis | Ichthyosiform abnormality of the skin | Ichthyotic skin | ichthyoses | non-syndromic ichthyosis

name: Palmar telangiectasia
definition: The presence of telangiectases on the skin of palm of hand.
synonyms: Telangiectases of palms and soles | Teleangiectases of palms

name: Fast-growing nails
definition: Nails whose growth is quicker than normal.

name: Yellow subcutaneous tissue covered by thin, scaly skin
Abnormality of dermal melanosomes
definition: An abnormality of the melanosomes, i.e., of the cellular organelles in which melanin pigments are synthesized and stored within melanocytes (the cells that produce pigment in the dermis).

name: Generalized hirsutism
definition: Abnormally increased hair growth over much of the entire body.
synonyms: Excessive hairiness over body | Generalised hirsutism

name: Generalized hyperpigmentation
synonyms: Generalised hyperpigmentation

name: Chalazion
definition: A chronic epithelioid cell granulomatous inflammation of the meibomian gland caused by inflammation of a blocked meibomian gland. A chalazion or meibomian cyst appears as a painless tuberous swelling in the upper lid without loss of eyelashes.
synonyms: Meibomian gland lipogranuloma

name: Abnormal dermoepidermal junction morphology
definition: Any anomaly of the structure of the acellular zone that is between the dermis and the epidermis and which functions to bind the epidermis to the dermis and to serve as a selective barrier allowing the control of molecular and cellular exchanges between the two compartments.

name: Distichiasis
definition: Double rows of eyelashes.
synonyms: Distichiasis of eyelid eyelashes

name: Freckling
definition: The presence of an increased number of freckles, small circular spots on the skin that are darker than the surrounding skin because of deposits of melanin.
synonyms: Freckling

name: Scaling skin
definition: Refers to the loss of the outer layer of the epidermis in large, scale-like flakes.
synonyms: Desquamation | Exfoliation | flaking skin | peeling skin | Scaling skin | Scaly skin

name: Abnormal plantar dermatoglyphics
definition: An abnormality of dermatoglyphs on the toes and soles, i.e., an abnormality of the patterns of ridges of the skin of sole of foot.
synonyms: Abnormal dermatoglyphics on feet | Abnormal prints on feet

name: Hair follicle neoplasm
definition: An uncontrolled autonomous cell-proliferation originating in a hair follicle, which is an epidermal adnexal structures responsible for hair growth.
synonyms: Hair Matrix neoplasm | Hair matrix tumour

name: Chronic monilial nail infection
definition: Chronic infection of the nails by Candida species.
synonyms: Fungal infection of the nail

name: Deep dermal perivascular inflammatory infiltrate
definition: Numerous lymphocytes surrounding blood vessels in the deep part of the dermis.
synonyms: Deep perivascular inflammatory infiltrate

name: Subcutaneous calcification
definition: Deposition of calcium salts in subcutaneous tissue (i.e., the the lowermost layer of the integument).
synonyms: Skin calcification

name: Rete ridge elongation
definition: Increased length of the rete rdiges of the epidermis.
synonyms: Elongation of rete ridges | Rete ridges elongated

name: Frontal balding
definition: Absence of hair in the anterior midline and/or parietal areas.
synonyms: Frontal balding | Male pattern baldness

name: Abnormal hair morphology
definition: An abnormality of the hair.
synonyms: Abnormality of the hair | Abnormality of the hair shaft | Hair abnormality

name: Deep plantar creases
definition: The presence of unusually deep creases (ridges/wrinkles) on the skin of sole of foot.
synonyms: Deep wrinkles in soles of feet

name: Ungual fibroma
definition: Flesh-colored papule in or around the nail bed. Ungual fibromas may be periungual (arising under the proximal nail fold) or subungual (originating under the nail plate).
synonyms: Koenen tumor | Koenen tumour | Koenen's tumor | Koenen's tumour | Parungual fibromas | Periungual fibroma

name: Periarticular subcutaneous nodules
definition: Subcutaneous nodules that are located in the vicinity of joints.

name: Medial flaring of the eyebrow
definition: An abnormal distribution of eyebrow hair growth in the medial direction.
synonyms: Medially flared eyebrows

name: Absent thumbnail
definition: Absence of thumb nail.

name: Generalized reticulate brown pigmentation
synonyms: Generalised reticulate brown pigmentation

name: Tongue neurofibroma
definition: A neurofibroma (benign peripheral nerve sheath tumor) localized in the tongue.

name: Facial wrinkling
definition: Excessive wrinkling of the skin of the face.
synonyms: Facial wrinkling

name: Absent upper eyelashes
synonyms: Absent upper eyelashes | Agenesis of upper eyelashes | Aplasia of upper eyelashes | Atrichia of upper eyelashes | Failure of development of upper eyelashes

name: Hypoplastic fingernail
definition: Underdevelopment of a fingernail.
synonyms: Small fingernail | Underdeveloped fingernail

name: Fair hair
definition: A lesser degree of hair pigmentation than would otherwise be expected.
synonyms: Blond hair | Fair hair | Fair hair color | Fair hair colour | Flaxen hair color | Flaxen hair colour | Light colored hair | Light coloured hair | Sandy hair color | Sandy hair colour

name: Bridged palmar crease
definition: A crease that connects the proximal and distal transverse palmar creases.
synonyms: Bridged palm line | Transitional palmar crease

name: Cutis marmorata
definition: A reticular discoloration of the skin with cyanotic (reddish-blue appearing) areas surrounding pale central areas due to dilation of capillary blood vessels and stagnation of blood within the vessels. Cutis marmorata generally occurs on the legs, arms and trunk and is often more severe in cold weather.

name: Pretibial hyperpigmentation
definition: Darkening of the area of skin that overlies the shin.

name: Abnormal perifollicular morphology
definition: Any structural anomaly in the areas surrounding the hair follicles.

name: Subcutaneous spheroids
definition: Small, hard cyst-like nodules, freely moveable in the subcutis over the bony prominences of the legs and arms, which have an outer calcified layer with a translucent core on x-ray.

name: Woolly scalp hair
definition: The presence of wooly hair on the scalp. The term wooly hair refers to an abnormal variant of hair that is fine, with tightly coiled curls, and often hypopigmented. Optical microscopy may reveal the presence of tight spirals and a clear diameter reduction as compared with normal hair. Electron microscopy may show flat, oval hair shafts with reduced transversal diameter.
synonyms: Afro-textured scalp hair | Kinky scalp hair texture | Nappy scalp hair texture | Wooly scalp hair

name: Onychomadesis
definition: Complete shedding (separation) of the nail from the proximal matrix. Onychomadesis is the proximal separation of the nail plate from the nail matrix due to a temporary cessation of nail growth.

name: Myxoid subcutaneous tumors
synonyms: Myxoid subcutaneous tumours

name: Inguinal freckling
definition: The presence in the inguinal region (groin) of an increased number of freckles, small circular spots on the skin that are darker than the surrounding skin because of deposits of melanin.
synonyms: Freckles in groin region

name: Telogen effluvium
definition: A type of hair loss characterized by an abnormal increase in dormant, telogen stage hair follicles.

name: Skin-colored papule
definition: A papule with the same color as the surrounding skin.
synonyms: Flesh-colored papule

name: Subcutaneous nodule
definition: Slightly elevated lesions on or in the skin with a diameter of over 5 mm.
synonyms: Firm lump under the skin | Growth of abnormal tissue under the skin | Multiple, subcutaneous nodules | Nodule below the skin | Subcutaneous nodules

name: Bull's eye rash
definition: A cutaneous eruption that consists of multiple (at least two) concentric erythematous rings.

name: Atypical nevi in non-sun exposed areas
Reduced terminal:vellus ratio
definition: A terminal:vellus ratio under 4:1 is characteristic of androgenetic alopecia.

name: Hyperconvex toenail
definition: When viewed on end (with the tip of the toe pointing toward the examiner's eye) the curve of the toenail forms a tighter curve of convexity.

name: Absent toenail
definition: Congenital absence of the toenail.
synonyms: Absent toenail | Absent toenails | Absent toenails (anonychia) | Anonychia of toenails

name: Cauliflower deformity of dermal collagen fibrils
definition: An anomaly of collagen fibers of the skin that is said to resemble a cauliflower and can be appreciated by electron microscopy.

name: Generalized hypotrichosis
definition: Reduced or lacking hair growth in a generalized distribution.
synonyms: Generalised hypotrichosis | Hypotrichosis, generalised | Hypotrichosis, generalized

name: Kerion
definition: Kerion is an erythematous, boggy, tender, often sterile, weeping nodule or plaque with pustules and draining sinuses. Hair in these areas appears lusterless, brittle, and is easily plucked. Kerion can be solitary or multiple but is usually unilateral. Patients with inflammatory tinea barbae may have constitutional symptoms like fever and malaise. Kerion is a coalesced sterile pustule, but occasionally they can get superinfected with cutaneous bacteria and develop regional lymphadenopathy.

name: Chilblains
definition: Chilblains, also called perniosis, are an inflammatory skin condition related to an abnormal vascular response to the cold. We are unaware of a reliable estimate of incidence. It typically presents as tender, pruritic red or bluish lesions located symmetrically on the dorsal aspect of the fingers, toes, ears and nose. Less commonly, reports describe involvement of the thighs and buttocks. The lesions present hours after exposure to cold and usually resolve spontaneously in one to three weeks.
synonyms: Chilblain lesions

name: Abnormal palmar dermatoglyphics
definition: An abnormality of the dermatoglyphs, i.e., an abnormality of the patterns of ridges of the skin of palm of hand.

name: Intermittent generalized erythematous papular rash
synonyms: Intermittent generalised erythematous papular rash

name: Nail elevation
definition: Elevation of the nail from the nail bed.

name: Prominent scalp veins
synonyms: Prominent scalp veins

name: Prominent superficial blood vessels
synonyms: Prominent superficial blood vessels | Prominent superficial vasculature

name: Fingerpad telangiectases
definition: Telangiectasia (small dilated blood vessels) located in the fingerpads at the tips of the fingers.
synonyms: Finger pad telangiectases | Small dilated blood vessels in fingerpads

name: Punctate palmar hyperkeratosis
definition: Tiny bumps of thickened skin (hyperkeratosis) on the palms of the hands.

name: Dry skin
definition: Skin characterized by the lack of natural or normal moisture.
synonyms: Dry skin | Xerosis

name: Fingernail dysplasia
definition: An abnormality of the development of the fingernails.
synonyms: Abnormal fingernail development | Dysplastic fingernails

name: Cutis gyrata of scalp
definition: The presence of convoluted folds and furrows formed from thickened skin of the scalp, resembling cerebriform pattern. The scalp has convoluted and elevated folds, 1 to 2 cm in thickness. The convolutions generally cannot be flattened by traction.
synonyms: Cutis verticis gyrata | Furrows in thickened skin on top of scalp | Scalp folds | Scalp furrows | Scalp rugae | Thickened folds on top of scalp | Thickening of the scalp

name: Lumbar hypertrichosis
definition: Excessive, increased hair growth located in the lumbar region.

name: Oropharyngeal squamous papilloma
definition: A benign exophytic neoplasm that arises from the oropharynx. It is characterized by the presence of a connective tissue core covered by stratified squamous epithelium [NCI thesaurus].
synonyms: Squamous papilloma of the uvula

name: Multiple palmar creases
definition: The presence of multiple creases on the palm of the hand (more than the normal three major creases (distal transverse crease, proximal transverse crease, and thenar crease).
synonyms: Multiple palm lines

name: Generalized hypertrichosis
definition: Generalized excessive, abnormal hairiness.
synonyms: Generalised hypertrichosis

name: Gottron sign
definition: Erythematous macules or patches over extensor surfaces of elbows, knuckles, knees, and ankles.

name: Palmar edema
definition: An abnormal accumulation of fluid beneath the skin on the palm of the hand.
synonyms: Palmar oedema

name: Severe photosensitivity
definition: A severe degree of photosensitivity of the skin.
synonyms: Severe sun sensitivity

name: Acrocyanosis
definition: Bluish discoloration of the skin of the hands or feet.
synonyms: Persistent blue color of hands or feet | Persistent blue colour of hands or feet

name: Excessive wrinkled skin
synonyms: Excessive wrinkled skin

name: Neoplasm of the skin
definition: A tumor (abnormal growth of tissue) of the skin.
synonyms: Dermatological tumors | Dermatological tumours | Neoplasia of the skin | Skin cancer | Skin cancer (non-melanoma) | Skin tumors | Skin tumours | Tumor of the skin | Tumour of the skin

name: Migratory erythematous plaque
definition: A migratory, centrifugal, erythematous, tender, non-purpuric, and well-demarcated plaque. This feature may be observed in TNF receptor-associated periodic syndrome, in which it often occurs together with migratory myalgia in muscles located underneath the affected areas of skin.

name: Abnormal location of the eyebrow
definition: Anomalous anatomical placement of the eyebrow.
synonyms: Abnormal location of eyebrows | Abnormally placed eyebrows

name: Predominantly epidermal neutrophilic infiltrate
definition: Collection of neutrophils in the epidermis.

name: Pilonidal abscess
definition: A hair-containing cyst or sinus usually in the coccygeal region.
synonyms: Sacrococcygeal fistula

name: Perifollicular fibrosis
definition: Presence of excess fibrous connective tissue surrounding hair follicules.

name: Gastrointestinal telangiectasia
definition: Telangiectasia affecting the gastrointestinal tract.
synonyms: GI telangiectasia | Small, enlarged blood vessels near skin

name: Non-pruritic urticaria
definition: Pale reddish slightly elevated papules and plaques of 0.5-3 cm in diameter and not accompanied by pruritus.
synonyms: Non-itchy hives

name: Seborrheic keratosis
definition: A raised growth on the skin of older individuals. The lesion usually is initially light tan and may darken to dark brown or nearly black. The consistent feature of seborrheic keratoses is their waxy, pasted-on or stuck-on look.
synonyms: Basal cell papilloma | Seborrheic verruca | Senile wart

name: Hirsutism
definition: Abnormally increased hair growth referring to a male pattern of body hair (androgenic hair).
synonyms: Excessive hairiness

name: Urticarial plaque
definition: A well-circumscribed, intensely pruritic, raised wheal (edema of the superficial skin) typically 1 to 2 cm in diameter.

name: Perianal erythema
definition: Erythema (Redness of the skin caused by hyperemia of the capillaries in the lower layers of the skin) localized to the region surrounding the anus.

name: Rope sign
definition: The presence of linear erythematous palpable cords, often on the lateral trunk.

name: Congenital alopecia totalis
definition: Loss of all scalp hair with congenital onset.

name: Lip pit
definition: A depression located on a lip.

name: Trichorrhexis invaginata
definition: A type of hair shaft dysmorphology in which the proximal part of the hair shaft overlaps the distal part, showing a bamboo-like appearance. This feature is pathognomic for Netherton syndrome, and can be ascertained by light microscopy.
synonyms: Bamboo hair | Helical hair

name: Triangular nail
definition: Nail so wide as long with a distal part presenting an acute angle.
synonyms: Triangular shaped nail

name: Long upper eyelashes
definition: Increased length of the upper eyelashes.
synonyms: Ciliary trichomegaly of upper eyelashes | Increased length of upper eyelashes | Long upper eyelashes

name: Hypergranulosis
definition: Hypergranulosis is an increased thickness of the stratum granulosum.

name: Hypoplastic fifth toenail
definition: Underdeveloped nails of the fifth toes.
synonyms: Small fifth toenail | Underdeveloped fifth toenail

name: Macular purpura
definition: Purpura that is flat (non-palpable, not raised).
synonyms: Flat purpura

name: Digital ulcer
definition: An open sore on the surface of the skin of a finger or toe.

name: Dermal papillary IgA deposition
definition: Accumulation of immunoglobulin A (IgA) surrounding dermal papillae, which are specialized cells that support the hair follicle.
synonyms: Granular IgA deposits at the dermal papillae

name: Interstitial dermal edema
definition: Accumulation of fluid in the interstitial spaces of the skin. This finding can be appreciated my microscopic examination of a skin biopsy.

name: Rheumatoid nodule
definition: A well-demarcated, flesh colored, subcutaneous and usually freely movable lump or mass. Rheumatoid nodules can vary in size from small, pea sized lesions up to the size of a lemon and are most often round. The nodules usually are doughy or firm however and not tender. Typically rheumatoid nodules are distributed over areas of repeated trauma or pressure and occur adjacent to joints on extensor surfaces, such as the elbow, fingers and forearms.

name: Skin pit
definition: A small, skin-lined tract that leads from the surface to deep within the tissues.
synonyms: Skin pit | Skin pits

name: Piezogenic pedal papules
definition: Flesh-colored or yellowish papules, 2 mm or larger, that are responses to internal mechanical pressure and weakness in the connective tissue in the dermis, appear commonly over the medial aspect of the heel, but in some cases on the wrists. They are thought to represent herniations of adipose tissue through the plantar fascia retinaculum.

name: Telangiectasia
definition: Telangiectasias refer to small dilated blood vessels located near the surface of the skin or mucous membranes, measuring between 0.5 and 1 millimeter in diameter. Telangiectasia are located especially on the tongue, lips, palate, fingers, face, conjunctiva, trunk, nail beds, and fingertips.
synonyms: Spider veins | Telangiectases

name: Poor wound healing
definition: A reduced ability to heal cutaneous wounds.
synonyms: Poor wound healing

name: Herpetiform vesicles
definition: Multiple vesicles distributed in multiple distinct groups consisting of multiple adjacent vesicles.

name: Generalized papillary lesions
synonyms: Generalised papillary lesions

name: Curly hair
synonyms: Curly hair

name: Abnormality of the plantar skin of foot
definition: An abnormality of the plantar part of foot, that is of the soles of the feet.
synonyms: Minor feet anomalies

name: Alopecia
definition: A noncongenital process of hair loss, which may progress to partial or complete baldness.
synonyms: Hair loss

name: Ingrown nail
definition: Excessive growth of a nail laterally into the nail fold.
synonyms: Ingrown nail

name: Congenital, generalized hypertrichosis
definition: A confluent, generalized overgrowth of silvery blonde to gray lanugo hair at birth.
synonyms: Congenital generalised hypertrichosis | Congenital generalized hypertrichosis | Congenital, generalised hypertrichosis | Hypertrichosis universalis

name: Anterior cervical hypertrichosis
definition: Anterior cervical hypertrichosis (ACH) or 'hairy throat' refers to the presence of a tuft of terminal hair on the anterior neck, just above the laryngeal prominence.
synonyms: Congenital cervical hypertrichosis | Hypertrichosis, congenital anterior cervical

name: Stratum basale cleavage
definition: Cleavage within the epidermal keratinocytes, which is the innermost layer of the epidermis and consists of proliferating cells that give rise to the outer layers of the epidermis.
synonyms: Blistering with cleavage within basal keratinocytes | Cleavage within the basal keratinocyte layer

name: Elevated terminal:vellus ratio
definition: An increased proportion of terminal hairs compared to vellus hairs.

name: Extension of hair growth on temples to lateral eyebrow
definition: A pattern of hair growth in which there is hair extending from the temples to the lateral eyebrows.
synonyms: Unusual hairline with hair growth on temples extending to lateral eyebrow

name: Eruptive xanthomas
definition: Eruptive xanthomas are yellow-orange-to-red-brown papules that are often surrounded by an erythematous halo. They appear in crops on the buttocks, extensor surfaces of the extremities, and flexural creases. Acutely, variable amounts of pruritus and pain occur.

name: Hypopigmented skin patches on arms
synonyms: Hypopigmented upper extremeity skin patches | Patchy loss of skin color on arms | Patchy loss of skin colour on arms

name: Decreased number of sweat glands
definition: The presence of fewer than normal sweat glands.
synonyms: Decreased sweat glands | Decreased sweat pores

name: Abnormal blistering of the skin
definition: The presence of one or more bullae on the skin, defined as fluid-filled blisters more than 5 mm in diameter with thin walls.
synonyms: Abnormal blistering of the skin | Blister | Blistering, generalised | Blistering, generalized | Blisters | Skin blisters | Skin bullae

name: Nevus sebaceus
definition: A solitary yellow-orange slightly raised plaque typically on scalp or face. The plaque typically thickens and becomes more verrucous or pebbly during childhood.

name: Absent sebaceous glands
definition: Absence of the sebaceous gland, the holocrine gland that secretes sebum into the hair follicles, or in hairless areas into ducts.
synonyms: Absence of sebaceous glands

name: Angiokeratoma corporis diffusum
definition: Angiokeratoma corporis diffusum (ACD) is typically characterized by innumerable small red to black papules which occur in clusters and are situated symmetrically in the bathing trunks area. The number of lesions and the extension of the body increase steadily with time so that generalization and mucosal involvement are common. The single lesion begins with a minute reddish papule which enlarges to up to 10 mm in diameter, becomes dark red to black with a discrete keratotic overgrowth. Histologic
synonyms: Fabry syndrome

name: Poroma
definition: A benign, well circumscribed sweat gland neoplasm with eccrine or apocrine differentiation. It usually presents as a solitary, dome-shaped papule, nodule, or plaque on acral sites. It is characterized by a proliferation of uniform basaloid cells in the dermis and it is associated with the presence of focal ductal and cystic structures [NCIT:C27273].
synonyms: Eccrine hidradenoma | Eccrine hidradenoma of skin | Poroma

name: Central cyanosis
definition: Generalized bluish discoloration of the body and the visible mucous membranes, which occurs due to inadequate oxygenation secondary to conditions that lead to an increase in deoxygenated hemoglobin or presence of abnormal hemoglobin.

name: Abnormal periungual morphology
definition: An abnormality of the region around the nails of the fingers or toes.
synonyms: Abnormality of the periungual region

name: Perianal abscess
definition: The presence of an abscess located around the anus.

name: Cutaneous horn
definition: A cutaneous horn is a keratinized non-malignant protrusion on the surface of the skin. Diagnosis is established by biopsy of the horn and biopsy of the horn and the underlying skin.
synonyms: Cornu cutaneum

name: Mongolian blue spot
definition: Congenital deep dermal melanosis in the sacral area.

name: Acrokeratosis
definition: Overgrowth of the stratum corneum characterized by flesh-coloured or slightly pigmented smooth or warty papules on the upper surface of hands and feet.
synonyms: Acral keratosis

name: Abnormal terminal:vellus ratio
definition: A deviation from the normal proportion of terminal to vellus hairs.

name: Positive pathergy test
definition: With the pathergy test, a small, sterile needle is inserted into the skin of the forearm. The site of injectionis circuled and observed after one and two days. If a small red bump or pustule at the site of needle insertion occurs, the pathergy test is considered to have a positive (abnormal) result.

name: Abnormal number of hair whorls
definition: More than two clockwise hair whorls.
synonyms: Abnormal number of hair swirls | Abnormal number of hair whorls | Double crown (hair whorls) | Extra hair swirls | Extra hair whorl | Supernumary hair swirls | Supernumary hair whorl

name: Renal neurofibroma
definition: A neurofibroma (benign peripheral nerve sheath tumor) localized in the kidney.

name: Vitiligo
definition: An autoimmune disease that causes depigmentation of patches of skin resulting from loss of function or death of melanoctyes." [url:http\://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vitiligo] {comment="ls:IEDB
synonyms: Blotchy loss of skin color | Blotchy loss of skin colour

name: Sparse facial hair
definition: Reduced number or density of facial hair.
synonyms: Sparse facial hair

name: Onycholysis of distal fingernails
definition: Detachment of the distal fingernails from the nail bed.
synonyms: Detachment of outermost fingernails

name: Fragile nails
definition: Nails that easily break.
synonyms: Brittle nails

name: Sparse scalp hair
definition: Decreased number of hairs per unit area of skin of the scalp.
synonyms: Decreased number of scalp follicles | Hypotrichosis on scalp | Reduced amount of scalp hair | Reduced/lack of hair on scalp | Reduction in the number of scalp follicles | Scalp hypotrichosis | Sparse scalp hair | Thin scalp hair | Thinning scalp hair

name: Absent axillary hair
definition: Absence of axillary hair.

name: Purulent drainage from skin
definition: Exudation of a thick, opaque fluid from a wound or skin lesion, typically as a result of infection and draining pus, i.e., dead white blood cells, bacteria, and tissue debris.

name: Onychogryphosis
