definition: Onychogryphosis is a disorder of nail plate growth that is clinically characterized by an opaque, yellow-brown thickening of the nail plate with associated gross hyperkeratosis, elongation, and increased curvature.
synonyms: Dystrophic thickened nails | Onychogryposis | Thick nail | Thickened nails

name: Sparse body hair
definition: Sparseness of the body hair.
synonyms: Limited body hair | Little body hair | Sparse body hair | Sparse to absent body hair

name: Chronic urticaria
definition: Urticaria characterized by spontaneously recurring hives for 6 weeks or longer.
synonyms: Chronic idiopathic urticaria | Chronic spontaneous urticaria | CIU | CSU

name: Papillary dermis eosinophilic hyaline material
definition: Accumulation of eosinophilic hyaline material observed around the papillary dermis and the blood vessels located in it. The papillary dermis is the uppermost layer of the dermis. It intertwines with the rete ridges of the epidermis and is composed of fine and loosely arranged collagen fibers.

name: Epidermal acanthosis
definition: Diffuse hypertrophy or thickening of the stratum spinosum of the epidermis (prickle cell layer of the skin).
synonyms: Acanthosis | Acanthotic epidermis | Epidermal hyperplasia | Thickening of upper layer of skin

name: Temporal hypotrichosis
definition: Reduced or lacking hair growth in the temporal region (i.e., around the temples on the side of the skull).
synonyms: Reduced hair growth in temporal region

name: Long eyelashes
definition: Mid upper eyelash length >10 mm or increased length of the eyelashes (subjective).
synonyms: Ciliary trichomegaly | Eyelash trichomegaly | Increased length of eyelashes | Long eyelashes | Unusually long eyelashes

name: Abnormal skin morphology
definition: Any morphological abnormality of the skin.
synonyms: Abnormal skin morphology | Abnormal skin structure | Abnormality of skin morphology

name: Double eyebrow
definition: This may present as a partial or complete duplication of the eyebrows.
synonyms: Double eyebrow | Duplication of eyebrow

name: Polymorphous light eruption
definition: The cardinal symptom is severely pruritic skin lesions. Macular, papular, papulovesicular, urticarial, multiforme- and plaque-like variants are differentiated morphologically, hence the name polymorphous. Usually one morphology dominates in a single individual (monomorphous). The skin lesions develop a few hours to several days after sun exposure. Initially, patchy erythema develops, accompanied by pruritus. Distinct lesions then develop. The upper chest, upper arms, backs of the hands, thighs,
synonyms: Sun allergy

name: Trichodiscoma
definition: A small benign fibrovascular tumor of the dermal part of the hair disk. Trichodiscoma is rather simple in appearance and consists of a dome-shaped fibrous tumor with a prominent vascular component that fills the papillary dermis under an atrophic epidermis. As in a normal hair disk, a hair follicle may be present at one edge of the papular lesion.

name: Cutis laxa
definition: Wrinkled, redundant, inelastic and sagging skin.
synonyms: Chalazoderma | Cutaneous laxity | Dermatochalasia | Dermatomegaly | Elastolysis | Generalised elastolysis | Generalized elastolysis | Hanging skin | Hypoelastic skin | Inelastic skin

name: Urticaria
definition: Raised, well-circumscribed areas of erythema and edema involving the dermis and epidermis. Urticaria is intensely pruritic, and blanches completely with pressure.
synonyms: Hives

name: Onycholysis of fingernails
synonyms: Detachment of fingernails | Onycholysis of fingernail

name: Nevus spilus
definition: A tan, regularly bordered patch with darker macules within the lesion.
synonyms: Speckled lentiginous Nevus

name: Pallor
definition: Abnormally pale skin.
synonyms: Paleness | Skin paleness

name: Abnormality of subcutaneous fat tissue
synonyms: Abnormality of fatty tissue below the skin

name: Luse bodies
definition: Fusiform collagen fibers with abnormally long spacing (exceeding 100 nm) between electron-dense bands.

name: Sebaceous gland carcinoma
definition: A carcinoma that arises in a sebaseous gland (an exocrine gland of the skin that secretes sebum, a waxy substance)
synonyms: Sebaceous carcinoma

name: Hyperpigmentation of eyelids
synonyms: Brown eyelids | Dark eyelids | Pigmentation of eyelids

name: Lichenification
definition: Thickening and hardening of the epidermis seen with exaggeration of normal skin lines.

name: Abnormality of lower eyelashes
synonyms: Abnormality of lower eyelashes

name: Reduced epidermal collagen XVII protein expression
synonyms: Skin biopsy: collagen XVII antibody staining abnormal or absent

name: Pili torti
definition: Pili (from Latin pilus, hair) torti (from Latin tortus, twisted) refers to short and brittle hairs that appear flattened and twisted when viewed through a microscope.
synonyms: Flattened and twisted hair

name: Exuberant granulation tissue
definition: A manifestation of abnormal wound healing in which there is formation of excessive granulation tissue, with the granulation tissue rising above the level of surrounding skin and creating a raised, reddish, moist, and bumpy surface.
synonyms: Hypergranulating wound | Overgranulation

name: Blistering by histological location
definition: Blistering (presence of multiple fluid filled blisters) categorized according to the layer of the skin in which the blister originates. The skin is divided into three layers. The epidermis (outermost layer, which mainly consists of keratinocytes), the dermis, and a subcutaneous layer. The epidermis is divided into five layers: the basal lamina (innermost layer), the basal cell layer, the stratum spinosum, the stratum granulosum, and the stratum corneum (outermost layer). Cleavage in epidermolysi

name: Dystrophic toenail
definition: Toenail changes apart from changes of the color of the toenail (nail dyschromia) that involve partial or complete disruption of the various keratinous layers of the nail plate.
synonyms: Dystrophic toenail changes | Dystrophic toenails | Poor toenail formation

name: Closed comedo
definition: A comedo in which the top of the pore is not stretched open and thus does not expose the clogged portion (which would appear black), hence the name whitehead.
synonyms: Whitehead

name: Excessive skin wrinkling on dorsum of hands and fingers
synonyms: Excessive skin wrinkling on back of hands and fingers

name: Melasma
definition: Symmetrical, blotchy, brownish facial pigmentation.
synonyms: Chloasma | Facial melanosis

name: Salty tasting skin
definition: Skin tastes marked salty without an obvious explanation such as heat or exercise. This finding can be observed in infants with cystic fibrosis.

name: Eyebrow scaling skin
definition: Loss of the outer layer of the epidermis in the area of the eyebrow in large, scale-like flakes.
synonyms: Scales on eyebrows

name: Numerous pigmented freckles
synonyms: Numerous pigmented freckles

name: Eczematoid dermatitis
definition: Eczema is a form of dermatitis that is characterized by scaly, pruritic, erythematous lesions located on flexural surfaces.
synonyms: Dermatitis | Eczema

name: Chronic furunculosis
definition: A furuncle (boil) is a skin infection involving an entire hair follicle and nearby skin tissue. Chronic furunculosis refers to recurrent episodes of furuncles, often caused by recurrent staphylococcus infection.

name: Decreased sweating due to autonomic dysfunction
Preauricular skin tag
definition: A rudimentary tag of skin often containing ear tissue including a core of cartilage and located just anterior to the auricle (outer part of the ear).
synonyms: Ear tag | Periauricular skin tag | Preauricular acrochordon | Preauricular fibroepithelial polyp | Preauricular skin tags | Preauricular tag | Preauricular tags | Skin tag in front of the ear | Skin tag on the posterior cheek

name: Generalized ichthyosis
synonyms: Generalised ichthyosis

name: Hairshafts with longitudinal grooves
definition: Long narrow depressions running lengthwise in hairshafts. This feature can be appreciated by scanning electron microsopy.

name: Molluscoid pseudotumors
definition: Bluish-grey, spongy nodules associated with scars over pressure points and easily traumatized areas like the elbows and knees.
synonyms: Molluscoid pseudotumor

name: Serpiginous burrow
definition: A slightly raised and often reddish serpentine or curvilinear path in the skin.

name: Perifolliculitis
definition: Inflammation surrounding hair follicles.
synonyms: Perifollicular inflammation

name: Atrophodermia vermiculata
definition: Symmetrical vermiform facial atrophy that affects mainly the forehead, the chin, the ear lobes and helices. Atrophodermia vermiculata is characterized by erythema and follicular plugs on the cheeks, developing into painless reticular impressions.
synonyms: Vermiculata atrophoderma

name: Abnormality of the axillary hair
definition: Abnormality of the growth of the axillary hair. Axillary hair is part of the secondary sexual hair, which normally ensues during puberty.

name: Brittle hair
definition: Fragile, easily breakable hair, i.e., with reduced tensile strength.
synonyms: Brittle hair | Easily breakable hair | Fractured hair | Fragile hair | Reduced tensile strength of hair

name: Increased number of elastic fibers in the dermis
definition: An elevated number of elastic fibers, that is of bundles of proteins and glycoproteins in the extracellular matrix in the reticular dermis. Elastic fibers can stretch and recoil back to their original length. This feature can be appreciated on histology with hematoxylin and eosin or other staining methods.
synonyms: Increased number of elastic fibres in the dermis

name: Xanthelasma
definition: The presence of xanthomata in the skin of the eyelid.
synonyms: Fatty deposits in skin around the eyes | Fatty deposits on eyelids | Xanthelasma of eyelid | Xanthelasma of periocular region | Xanthelasma palpebrarum | Xanthoma | Xanthoma of eyelid | Xanthoma of periocular region

name: Cleavage at junction of stratum corneum and stratum granulosum
definition: Splitting of the skin (cell-cell adhesion of keratinocytes) localized to the interface between the stratum corneum and stratum granulosum layers of the epidermis.

name: Follicular hyperkeratosis
definition: A skin condition characterized by excessive development of keratin in hair follicles, resulting in rough, cone-shaped, elevated papules resulting from closure of hair follicles with a white plug of sebum.
synonyms: Hyperkeratosis follicularis

name: Upslanting toenail
definition: Upturned concavity of toenails.
synonyms: Ski-jump toenail | Upturned toenail

name: Nodular melanoma
definition: A type of melanoma that starts as a raised area that is usually dark blackish-blue or bluish-red but may not have any color.
synonyms: nodular melanoma

name: Sparse medial eyebrow
definition: Decreased density/number and/or decreased diameter of medial eyebrow hairs.
synonyms: Medial thinning of eyebrow

name: Yellow nodule
definition: A type of skin nodule (a lesions that is greater than either 10mm in both width and depth, and most frequently centered in the dermis or subcutaneous fat) with a yellowish coloration (that reflects a high lipid content of the lesion).

name: Onychogryphosis of toenails
definition: Thickened toenails.
synonyms: Overgrowth and curving of toenails

name: Scarring alopecia of scalp
synonyms: Cicatricial alopecia | Hair loss on scalp from scarring condition

name: Congenital ichthyosiform erythroderma
definition: An ichthyosiform abnormality of the skin with congenital onset.
synonyms: Congenital ichthyosis | Ichthyosis, congenital

name: Congenital onychodystrophy
synonyms: Congenital malformed nails

name: Sub-lamina densa cleavage
definition: A type of blistering in which the cleavage plane of blisters is located below the lamina densa.
synonyms: Blistering with sub-lamina densa plane of cleavage

name: Antecubital pterygium
definition: Pterygium affecting the elbow. This is a cutaneous web that can lead to severe flexion contracture of the elbow joint. Antecubital pterygium can be unilateral, bilateral, symmetric, or asysmmetric.
synonyms: Pterygium cubitale | Webbed elbow

name: Petechiae
definition: Petechiae are pinpoint-sized reddish/purple spots, resembling a rash, that appear just under the skin or a mucous membrane when capillaries have ruptured and some superficial bleeding into the skin has happened. This term refers to an abnormally increased susceptibility to developing petechiae.

name: Scaling skin on fingertip
definition: Loss of the outer layer of the epidermis in large, scale-like flakes localized to one or more fingertips.

name: Curly eyelashes
definition: Abnormally curly or curved eyelashes.
synonyms: Curly eyelashes

name: Ski jump nail
definition: Nails that slope upward at the free edge.
synonyms: Upslanting nail | Upward angulation of nail

name: Proximal scleroderma
definition: Symmetrical thickening, tightening and induration of the skin of the fingers and the skin proximal to the metacarpophalangeal or metatarsophalangeal joints. These changes can involve the entire limb, face, neck and trunk.

name: Prominent palmar flexion creases
synonyms: Prominent life line

name: Hiker's feet
definition: Hyperkeratotic scaly fissured plaques on the fingers/palms or soles, generally more evident on the lateral aspect of index fingers.

name: Reduced epidermal keratin protein expression
definition: Amount of one or more keratins in the epidermis below the lower limit of normal. The findiong is typically ascertained by immunofluorescent microscopy.

name: Heliotrope rash of eyelid
definition: Heliotrope rash is a violaceous discoloration of the eyelids associated with periorbital edema.

name: Periungual erythema
definition: Erythema (redness of the skin caused by hyperemia in superficial capillaries) in the region surrounding a fingernail or toe nail.

name: Red hair
synonyms: Ginger hair color | Ginger hair colour | Red hair | Red hair color | Red hair colour | Red head (hair color)

name: Molluscum contagiosum
definition: Molluscum contagiosum is a cutaneous viral infection that is commonly observed in both healthy and immunocompromised children. The infection is caused by a member of the Poxviridae family, the molluscum contagiosum virus. Molluscum contagiosum presents as single or multiple small white or flesh-colored papules that typically have a central umbilication. The central umbilication may be difficult to observe in young children and, instead, may bear an appearance similar to an acneiform eruption. Th

name: Ecchymosis
definition: A purpuric lesion that is larger than 1 cm in diameter.
synonyms: Ecchymoses

name: Volar fingernail
definition: The presence of an extra nail on the palmar (volar, ventral) surface of the finger.
synonyms: Palmar fingernail | Ventral fingernail

name: Slow-growing nails
definition: Nails whose growth is slower than normal.
synonyms: Slow-growing nails

name: Hypertrophy of skin of soles
synonyms: Thick skin of soles

name: Giant melanosomes in melanocytes
definition: The presence of large spherical melanosomes (1 to 6 micrometer in diameter) in the cytoplasm of melanocytes.
synonyms: Macromelanosomes

name: Paronychia
definition: The nail disease paronychia is an often-tender bacterial or fungal hand infection or foot infection where the nail and skin meet at the side or the base of a finger or toenail. The infection can start suddenly (acute paronychia) or gradually (chronic paronychia).

name: Linear C3 deposits along the epidermal basement membrane zone
definition: Presence of complement C3 in the dermoepidermal junction that are distributed in a linear pattern. This feature can be appreciated by immunofluorescence microscopy.

name: Ash-leaf spot
definition: A hypopigmented spot in the shape of a leaf from the mountain ash tree.

name: Recurrent vulvovaginal candidiasis
definition: Recurrent infection involving the vulva, vagina, and adjacent crural areas, whereby the causative agent belongs to the genus Candida.

name: Premature graying of body hair
synonyms: Premature graying of body hair | Premature greying of body hair

name: Milia
definition: Presence of multiple small cysts containing keratin (skin protein) and presenting as tiny pearly-white bumps just under the surface of the skin.
synonyms: Milk spot | Millium cyst

name: Abnormality of the scalp hair
definition: An abnormality of the hair of head.
synonyms: Abnormality of the scalp hair

name: Cutaneous cyst
definition: A hollow mass located in the skin that is surrounded by an epithelium-lined wall and is well demarcated from the adjacent tissue. Cysts are often said to be sac-like and may contain serous liquid or semisolid material.
synonyms: Skin cyst

name: Morphea
definition: Isolated patches of hardened skin (scleroderma).

name: Inflammatory abnormality of the skin
definition: The presence of inflammation of the skin. That is, an abnormality of the skin resulting from the local accumulation of fluid, plasma proteins, and leukocytes.
synonyms: Abnormal tendency to infections of the skin | Inflammatory abnormality of the skin | Inflammatory skin disease | Skin inflammation

name: Hand dimple
definition: A cutaneous indentation resulting from tethering of the skin to underlying structures (bone) of the hand.
synonyms: Hand dimples

name: Hyperkeratosis lenticularis perstans
definition: Hyperkeratosis lenticularis perstans (HLP), also known as Flegel disease, is a keratinization abnormality characterized by small, asymptomatic erythematous papules that leave characteristic punctate bleeding when they become detached. The lesions generally occur symmetrically along the top of the foot and on the legs, appearing more rarely on the arms, forearms, palms, and soles, and even on the oral mucosa.
synonyms: Flegel disease

name: Localized area of pendulous skin
definition: A confined region of lax skin that hangs below the level of the surrounding skin. Histopatholigically, there is a loss of elastic fibers in the dermis of the affected region.
synonyms: Localised area of pendulous skin

name: Nevus of Ota
definition: A dermal melanocytic hamartoma that presents as bluish hyperpigmentation on the face along the first or second branches of the trigeminal nerve. Nevus of Ota may involve the sclera.
synonyms: Congenital melanosis bulbi | Mongolian spot | Naevus fuscoceruleus ophthalmomaxillaris | Nevus fuscoceruleus ophthalmomaxillaris | Nevus of Ito | Oculodermal melanocytosis

name: Reduced epidermal keratin 14 protein expression
definition: Amount of keratin 14 in the epidermis below the lower limit of normal. The findiong is typically ascertained by immunofluorescent microscopy.

name: Absence of epidermal lamellar bodies
definition: Lack of lamellar bodies (LBs) inthe epidermis. LBs are specialized organelles that contain pro-barrier lipids imparting a fully lamellar internal structure, but also other cargoes such as enzymes (lipid metabolizing and proteolytic), enzyme inhibitors, and antimicrobial peptides.

name: Hyperpigmentation of the skin
definition: A darkening of the skin related to an increase in melanin production and deposition.
synonyms: Cutaneous hyperpigmentation | Hyperpigmented lesion | Increased skin pigmentation | Melanoderma | Melanodermia | Patchy darkened skin | Skin hyperpigmentation

name: Acanthoma
definition: A benign epithelial skin tumor manifesting as a slightly elevated circular plaque or nodule with a red, pink or brown color and a diameter up to 22 mm.

name: Nail bed hemorrhage
definition: Small areas of bleeding (hemorrhage) under the fingernail or toenail.
synonyms: Nail bed haemorrhage

name: Apocrine hidrocystoma
definition: A cystic lesions that forms a benign tumor of an apocrine sweat gland.

name: Coarse hair
definition: Hair shafts are rough in texture.
synonyms: Coarse hair | Coarse hair texture | Rough hair texture

name: Hyperconvex thumb nails
synonyms: Tightly curved thumb nail

name: Early balding
definition: Loss of scalp hair at an earlier than normal age.
synonyms: Early balding

name: Telangiectasia of the skin
definition: Presence of small, permanently dilated blood vessels near the surface of the skin, visible as small focal red lesions.
synonyms: Teleangiectasia of the skin

name: Aplasia cutis congenita over the scalp vertex
definition: A developmental defect resulting in the congenital absence of skin on the scalp vertex, often just lateral to the midline.
synonyms: Absent cutis congenita of vertex | Aplasia cutis congenita of vertex

name: Chromhidrosis
definition: Secretion of colored sweat.

name: Epidermal nevus
definition: Epidermal naevi are due to an overgrowth of the epidermis and may be present at birth (50%) or develop during childhood.
synonyms: Epidermal nevi | nonepidermolytic keratinocytic nevus

name: Ragged cuticle
definition: The cuticle (properly known as the eponychium, or the medial nail fold or the proximal nail fold), is the thickened layer of skin surrounding fingernails and toenails. Its function is to protect the area between the nail and epidermis from exposure to bacteria. This term refers to the presence of and irregular edge or outline of the cuticle.

name: Late onset atopic dermatitis
definition: A form of atopic dermatitis with onset in adulthood characterized by atopic red face, chronic lichenified eczema on the trunk, subacute or psoriasiform dermatitis.
synonyms: Late onset baby eczema

name: Darier's sign
definition: A skin change elicited by briskly rubbing the skin lesion in urticaria pigmentosa (UP), whereby the area begins to itch and becomes raised and surrounded by erythema. Unlike other forms of dermatographism, Darier's sign refers to urtication that is limited to the UP involved areas and, as in this case, spares the skin unaffected by UP.

name: Aplasia/Hypoplasia of the palmar creases
definition: Absence or underdevelopment of the palmar creases.
synonyms: Absent/small palm crease | Absent/underdeveloped palm crease

name: Neurofibroma
definition: A benign peripheral nerve sheath tumor that generally appears as a soft, skin-colored papule or small subcutaneous nodule. Individuals with neurofibromatosis can have numerous neurofibromas.
synonyms: multiple neurofibromas | Neurofibromata | Neurofibromatosis

name: Highly arched eyebrow
definition: Increased height of the central portion of the eyebrow, forming a crescent, semicircular, or inverted U shape.
synonyms: Arched eyebrows | Bowed and upward slanting eyebrows | Broad, arched eyebrows | High arched eyebrows | High, rounded eyebrows | High-arched eyebrows | Highly arched eyebrow | Thick, flared eyebrows

name: Ridged fingernail
definition: Longitudinal, linear prominences in the fingernail plate.
synonyms: Longitudinally grooved fingernails | Ridged fingernail | Ridged fingernails

name: Monilethrix
definition: The hair shaft has a beaded appearance due to the presence of elliptical nodes that have the diameter of normal hair and are medullated, regularly separated by internodes that are narrow, devoid of medulla and are the site of fracture.

name: Palmoplantar hyperhidrosis
definition: An abnormally increased perspiration on palms and soles.
synonyms: Excessive sweating of palms and soles | Hyperhidrosis of palms and soles

name: Partial duplication of eyebrows
synonyms: Partial double eyebrow | Partial duplication of eyebrows

name: Ipsilateral lack of facial sweating
definition: Inability to sweat on the same side of the face that is affected by ptosis and miosis. This is a feature of Horner syndrome.

name: Minimal subcutaneous fat
synonyms: Minimal fat below the skin

name: Honeycomb palmoplantar hyperkeratosis
definition: Abnormal thickening of the skin on the palms and soles with an honeycomb pattern.

name: Widow's peak
definition: Frontal hairline with bilateral arcs to a low point in the midline of the forehead.
synonyms: Hairline peak | Hairline point | Pointed frontal hairline | Pointed hairline at front of head | V-shaped frontal hairline | Widow's peak

name: Intracellular accumulation of collagen VII
definition: Collagen VII is the major molecular constituent of anchoring fibrils in the skin. Collagen VII is synthesized as three identical pro-alpha1(VII) polypeptide chains, which are hydroxylated and glycosylated in a coordinated manner and then fold into triple-helical procollagen VII in the endoplasmic reticulum (ER). Mature collagen VII undergoes a multistep fibril polymerization process to form the anchoring fibrils. Mutant pro-alpha1(VII) polypeptide chains or procollagen VII molecules do not pass

name: Hyperpigmented nodule
definition: A nodule of the skin that exhibits an increased amount of pigmentation.

name: Plantar telangiectasia
definition: Telangiectases (small dilated blood vessels) located on the skin of sole of foot.
synonyms: Plantar teleangiectasia | Telangiectases of soles | Teleangiectases of soles

name: Reduced epidermal bullous pemphigoid antigen 1 protein expression
definition: Lower than normal amount of bullous pemphigoid antigen 1 (BP230) in the epidermis.
synonyms: Skin biopsy: BPAG1-e antibody staining abnormal or absent

name: Multiple lentigines
definition: Presence of an unusually high number of lentigines (singular: lentigo), which are flat, tan to brown oval spots.
synonyms: Liver spots

name: Impaired stimulus-induced skin wrinkling
definition: A reduced ability of the skin of the fingertips to wrinkle when exposed to stimuli such as soaking in water or application of EMLA cream (the fingertip remains smooth).

name: Circumferential skin creases on extremities
definition: Ringed creases of the skin of the extremities related to folding of excess skin.

name: Linear IgG deposits along the epidermal basement membrane zone
definition: Presence of IgG antibodies in the dermoepidermal junction that are distributed in a linear pattern. This feature can be appreciated by immunofluorescence microscopy.

name: Dermal flame figures
definition: Flame-figures are composed of a central part consisting of collagen fibers and eosinophilic granules, surrounded by a histiocytic and eosinophilic infiltrate. Subsequently, eosinophils tend to disappear and are replaced by phagocytic granulomas, consisting of histiocytes and sometimes giant cells, around the flame figures.

name: Abnormal sweat gland morphology
definition: Any structural abnormality of the sweat gland.
synonyms: Abnormalities of sweating | Abnormality of the sweat gland | Sweat gland disease

name: Fracture blister
definition: Fracture blister is a type of blister that forms following acute bone fractures, typically near the ankle, wrist elbow or foot, where skin adheres tightly to bone with little subcutaneous fat cushioning. The blister that results resembles that of a second degree burn.

name: Nail pterygium
definition: Inward advance of skin over the nail plate.
synonyms: Nail pterygium | Pterygium of nails

name: Palmar hyperkeratosis
definition: Abnormal thickening of the skin localized to the palm of the hand.

name: Freckles in sun-exposed areas
synonyms: Freckles in sun-exposed areas

name: Cutaneous abscess
definition: A circumscribed area of pus or necrotic debris in the skin (within the epidermis or dermis).
synonyms: Skin abscess

name: Fused nails
definition: A nail plate that has a longitudinal separation with partially separated nails, each with a separate lateral radius of curvature.
synonyms: Fused nails

name: Dorsocervical fat pad
definition: An area of fat accumulation at the back of the neck in the form of a hump.
synonyms: Buffalo hump

name: Streaks of hyperkeratosis along each finger onto the palm
Aplasia/Hypoplasia of the skin
synonyms: Absent/small skin | Absent/underdeveloped skin

name: Beaked nails
definition: Severe nail curvature, causing the tip of the nail to point downwards with respect to the axis of the finger. Beaked nails are caused by resorption of the distal digit.

name: Jaundice
definition: Yellow pigmentation of the skin due to bilirubin, which in turn is the result of increased bilirubin concentration in the bloodstream.
synonyms: Icterus | Jaundice | Yellow skin | Yellowing of the skin

name: Axillary apocrine gland hypoplasia
definition: Developmental hypoplasia of the apocrine sweat glands in the region of the axilla.

name: Prominent digit pad
definition: A soft tissue prominence of the ventral aspects of the fingertips or toe tips.
synonyms: Prominent digit pad

name: Nevus anemicus
definition: A congenital skin lesion characterized by irregular hypopigmented macules that coalesce to form plaques and occur particularly on the chest. It is generally present at birth or develops in the first days of life. It is more common in females. Diagnosis is confirmed by applying gentle friction to the lesion and the surrounding skin and checking that the erythema produced in the healthy skin does not appear in the hypopigmented lesion. This pale macule becomes more conspicuous when the lesion and
synonyms: Naevus anaemicus

name: Progeroid facial appearance
definition: A degree of wrinkling of the facial skin that is more than expected for the age of the individual, leading to a prematurely aged appearance.
synonyms: Aged facial appearance | Premature aged appearance | Prematurely aged face | Prematurely aged facial appearance | Wizened face

name: Generalized abnormality of skin
definition: An abnormality of the skin that is not localized to any one particular region.
synonyms: Generalised abnormality of skin | Generalized abnormality of skin

name: Poikiloderma
definition: Poikiloderma refers to a patch of skin with (1) reticulated hypopigmentation and hyperpigmentation, (2) wrinkling secondary to epidermal atrophy, and (3) telangiectasias.

name: Absent lunula
definition: Lack of the lunula at the base of a nail. The lunula is the crescent-shaped whitish area of the bed of a fingernail or toenail.
synonyms: Absent lunulae | Lunula absent | Lunulae absent

name: Acral blistering
definition: Bullae (defined as fluid-filled blisters more than 5 mm in diameter with thin walls) of the skin with an acral distribution (affecting peripheral regions such as hands and feet).

name: Vesicular eruption
definition: A type of acute-onset skin rash characterized by multiple vesicles, which are circumscribed, fluid-containing, epidermal elevation generally considered less than 10mm in diameter at the widest point. The fluid contained in a vesicle may be clear, serous, or hemorrhagic.

name: Desquamation of skin soon after birth
Pruritis on hand
definition: Pruritus is an itch or a sensation that makes a person want to scratch. This term refers to an abnormally increased sensation of itching over the skin of the hand.

name: Macular hypopigmented whorls, streaks, and patches
Subcutaneous emphysema
definition: Skin emphysema/Subcutaneous emphysema occurs when gas or air accumulates and seeps under the skin, where normally no gas should be present. While the presence of air in subcutaneous or mediastinal tissue is not dangerous in itself, prompt recognition of the underlying cause is essential.
synonyms: Skin emphysema

name: Abnormal sebaceous gland morphology
definition: Any structural anomaly of the sebaceous glands.

name: Papulovesicular eruption
definition: An acute onset rash characterized by by multiple vesicles, which are circumscribed, fluid-containing, epidermal elevations with a diameter less than 10mm at the widest point, and by multiple papules, which are circumscribed, solid epidermal elevations with no visible fluid with a diameter less than 10mm at the widest point.
synonyms: Papulo-vesicular eruption

name: Intermittent jaundice
definition: Jaundice that is sometimes present, sometimes not.
synonyms: Intermittent icterus | Intermittent yellow skin | Intermittent yellowing of skin

name: Pruritus on foot
definition: Pruritus is an itch or a sensation that makes a person want to scratch. This term refers to an abnormally increased sensation of itching over the skin of the foot.
synonyms: Itchy feet | Itchy foot

name: Thin toenail
definition: Toenail that appears thin when viewed on end.
synonyms: Thin toenail | Thin toenails

name: Absent pubic hair
definition: Absence of pubic hair.
synonyms: Absent pubic hair

name: Reduced epidermal integrin alpha6beta4 protein expression
synonyms: Skin biopsy: integrin alpha6beta4 antibody staining abnormal or absent

name: Mottled pigmentation
definition: Patchy and irregular skin pigmentation.
synonyms: Mottled skin coloring | Mottled skin colouring | Stippled pigmentation

name: Adenoma sebaceum
definition: The presence of a sebaceous adenoma with origin in the sebum secreting cells of the skin.
synonyms: Facial angiofibromas | Sebaceous adenoma | Sebaceous adenomas

name: Sacral hypertrichosis
definition: Excessive, increased hair growth located in the sacral region.

name: Partial albinism
definition: Absence of melanin pigment in various areas, which is found at birth and is permanent. The lesions are known as leucoderma and are often found on the face, trunk, or limbs.
synonyms: Congenital partial albinism on face, trunk, or limbs | Congenital partial leucoderma | Partial absent skin pigmentation

name: Large cafe-au-lait macules with irregular margins
definition: Large hypermelanotic macules with jagged borders.

name: Capillary malformation
definition: A capillary malformation is a flat, sharply defined vascular stain of the skin. It may cover a large surface area or it may be scattered and appear as little islands of color. In a capillary maformation, the predominant vessels are small, slow-flow vessels (i.e., arterioles and postcapillary venules).

name: Nail psoriasis
definition: Psoriatic nail abnormality characterized by the presence of neutrophils in the nail bed epithelium, hyperkeratosis with parakeratosis, presence of exudates on the corneal epithelium, focal hypogranulosis and psoriasiform hyperplasia of the nail bed.

name: Abnormal hair quantity
definition: An abnormal amount of hair.
synonyms: Abnormal hair quantity | Abnormality of hair density

name: Verrucae
definition: Warts, benign growths on the skin or mucous membranes that cause cosmetic problems as well as pain and discomfort. Warts most often occur on the hands, feet, and genital areas.
synonyms: Warts

name: Absent lanugo
definition: Lack of development of lanugo, the fine, soft, unpigmented hair on the body of a fetus or newborn baby.

name: Thick eyebrow
definition: Increased density/number and/or increased diameter of eyebrow hairs.
synonyms: Bushy eyebrows | Dense eyebrow | Heavy eyebrows | Hypertrichosis of the eyebrow | Hypertrichosis of the eyebrows | Prominent eyebrows | Thick eyebrow | Thick eyebrows

name: Subepidermal blistering
definition: A type of blistering in which the lesions are located beneath the epidermis.

name: Cigarette-paper scars
definition: Thin (atrophic) and wide scars.
synonyms: Cigarette paper scarring | Cigarette-paper scars

name: Draining sinus tract in skin
definition: A sinus tract is an abnormal channel that originates from the skin or a mucous surface to a deep-seated focus of suppuration.
synonyms: Discharging sinus | Draining tract in skin | Tract under skin draining associated abscess

name: Abnormal dermis morphology
definition: A structural anomaly of the dermis, the layer of skin that lies beneath the epidermis and above the subcutaneous layer.

name: Vibratory urticaria
definition: Urticaria in response to dermal vibration, with coincident degranulation of mast cells and increased histamine levels in serum.

name: Dermal immune complex deposition
definition: Accumulation of antigen-bound antibody in the skin.

name: Palpable purpura
definition: A type of purpura in which the lesions are raised (and can therefore be appreciated upon palpation).

name: Subcutaneous lipoma
definition: The presence of subcutaneous lipoma.

name: Erythematous macule
definition: A macule (flat, distinct, discolored area of skin less than 1 cm wide that does not involve any change in the thickness or texture of the skin) with a red or reddish color often associated with inflammation or irritation.

name: Suprabasal cleavage
definition: Cleavage within the suprabasal cell layer of the epidermis, which lies directly above the basal layer and is composed of five to ten layers of cells.
synonyms: Blistering with suprabasal clefting

name: Pruritis on abdomen
definition: Pruritus is an itch or a sensation that makes a person want to scratch. This term refers to an abnormally increased sensation of itching over the skin of the abdomen.

name: Plantar warts
definition: Multiple verrucous lesions on the skin of the sole of the foot. These lesions are raised, have a thickened and rough surface, and may display prominent black dots (thrombosed capillaries). Palmar warts are caused by caused by human papillomavirus (HPV).

name: Cutaneous necrosis
definition: Skin and subcutaneous tissue necrosis (tissue death). Clinically, cutaneous necrosis may present as a painful and extremely tender black eschar (dead tissue found in a full-thickness wound) surrounded by dusky grey-red colored skin or as slough (dead tissue, usually cream or yellow in colour).
synonyms: Skin necrosis | Skin necrotic patch

name: Tendon xanthomatosis
definition: The presence of xanthomas (intra-and extra-cellular accumulations of cholesterol) extensor tendons (typically over knuckles, Achilles tendon, knee, and elbows).
synonyms: Tendon xanthomas

name: Nevus flammeus of the forehead
definition: Naevus flammeus localized in the skin of the forehead.
synonyms: Port-wine stain on forehead

name: Skin burn
definition: Damage to the skin and underlying tissues caused by an agents such as heat, chemicals, electricity, radiation, or friction, resulting in pain, redness, swelling, and sometimes blisters or charring.

name: Erythroderma
definition: An inflammatory exfoliative dermatosis involving nearly all of the surface of the skin. Erythroderma develops suddenly. A patchy erythema may generalize and spread to affect most of the skin. Scaling may appear in 2-6 days and be accompanied by hot, red, dry skin, malaise, and fever.
synonyms: Exfoliative dermititis | Generalised erythroderma | Generalised erythrodermia | Generalized erythroderma | Generalized erythrodermia | Red scaly skin caused by inflammatory skin disease

name: Lack of skin elasticity
synonyms: Tight skin

name: Axillary and groin hyperpigmentation and hypopigmentation
Palmoplantar peeling
definition: Splitting within the the upper lyer (stratum corneum) of the epidermis clinically characterized by shedding of dead cells from the outermost layer of skin.
synonyms: Dyshidrosis lamellosa sicca | Exfoliative keratolysis | Focal palmoplantar peeling | Palmoplantar desquamation | Palmoplantar keratolysis

name: Hypohidrosis
definition: Abnormally diminished capacity to sweat.
synonyms: Decreased ability to sweat | Decreased sweating | Impaired sweating | Inadequate sweating | Oligohidrosis | Sweating, decreased

name: Onychauxis
definition: Thickened nails without deformity.

name: Low anterior hairline
definition: Distance between the hairline (trichion) and the glabella (the most prominent point on the frontal bone above the root of the nose), in the midline, more than two SD below the mean. Alternatively, an apparently decreased distance between the hairline and the glabella.
synonyms: Low frontal hairline | Low-set frontal hairline

name: Broad medial eyebrow
definition: Regional increase in the width (height) of the middle portion of the eyebrow.
synonyms: Medial broadening of eyebrows

name: Large keratohyaline granules
definition: Abnormally large keratohyalin granules (KHG). KHG are typically present in the stratum granulosum of the epidermal layer of the skin (and epithelium of the mucosae). KHG are protein structures found in the keratinocytes of the stratum granulosum.

name: Disseminated molluscum contagiosum
definition: The presence of molluscum contagiosum lesions across multiple areas of the body.

name: Episodic hyperhidrosis
definition: Intermittent episodes of abnormally increased perspiration.
synonyms: Hyperhidrosis, episodic | Sporadic excessive sweating

name: Actinic keratosis
definition: A scaly, crusty lesion caused by damage from the ultraviolet radiation of the sun, with typical location on sun-exposed areas of the skin. Actinic keratosis lesions are often elevated, rough, and wartlike, and may be red, or occasionally tan, pink, or flesh-toned in color.
synonyms: Solar keratosis

name: Fibrofolliculoma
definition: Fibrofolliculoma is a clinically asymptomatic, 2-4 mm, skin-colored, dome-shaped smooth papule. It usually arises in the form of multiple lesions in adults in different areas such as the scalp, forehead, face, and neck. According to histology, the lesion is a fibrotic hamartoma characterized by infundibular epithelial proliferation and perifollicular fibrous proliferation.
synonyms: Fibrofolliculomas

name: White eyebrow
definition: White color (lack of pigmentation) of the eyebrow.
synonyms: Blonde eyebrow | Depigmented eyebrow | Grey eyebrow | Hypopigmented eyebrow | Pale eyebrow | White eyebrow

name: Vaginal pruritus
definition: A sensation of itching in the vagina.

name: Upper lip pit
definition: Depression located on the vermilion of the upper lip, usually paramedian.

name: Broad nail
definition: Increased width of nail.
synonyms: Broad fingernails | Broad nail | Wide fingernails

name: Sparse eyelashes
definition: Decreased density/number of eyelashes.
synonyms: Hypotrichosis of eyelashes | Partial absence of eyelashes | Scant eyelashes | Scanty eyelashes | Sparse eyelashes | Thin eyelashes

name: Thick hair
definition: Increased density of hairs, i.e., and elevated number of hairs per unit area.
synonyms: Increased follicular density | Increased hair density | Thick hair

name: Lamina lucida cleavage
definition: The formation of bullae (blisters) with cleavage in the lamina lucida layer of the skin.
synonyms: Blistering with junctional split | Junctional split | Subepidermal blistering with cleavage in the lamina lucida

name: Hydroa vacciniforme
definition: In response to the spring sun distinct inflamed reddened skin develops on the ears, nose, cheeks, fingers, backs of the hands, and the lower arms, on which blisters with serous or hemorrhagic content develop. These dry out with the formation of a blackish scab. After shedding of the scab, depressed, varioliform, often hypopigmented scars remain. In addition, hyper- and hypopigmentation are present together, resulting in a polymorphous skin presentation.
synonyms: Acute vesiculation and crusting and scarring following sun exposure

name: Sebaceous hyperplasia
definition: A common, benign skin condition involving hypertrophy of the sebaceous glands characterized by single or multiple lesions that manifest as yellow, soft, small papules with umbilication. The lesions are located commonly on the central face (specifically, the nose, cheeks and forehead) but may also occur elsewhere, including the chest, mouth, scrotum, foreskin, penile shaft, vulva, and areola.

name: Hypohidrotic ectodermal dysplasia
definition: Hypohidrotic ectodermal dysplasia (HED) is a genetic disorder of ectoderm development characterized by malformation of ectodermal structures such as skin, hair, teeth and sweat glands. It comprises three clinically almost indistinguishable subtypes with impaired sweating as the key symptom: Christ-Siemens-Touraine (CST) syndrome (X-linked), autosomal recessive (AR), and autosomal dominant (AD) HED, as well as a fourth rare subtype with immunodeficiency as the key symptom (HED with immunodeficien

name: Genital warts
definition: Warts affecting the skin in the genital area (penile shaft, scrotum, vagina, or labia majora). Warts can be small, beginning as a pinhead-size swelling that may become larger and take on a pedunculated appearance. Warts can spread and coalesce into large masses in the genital or anal area. Their color is variable but tends to be skin colored or darker, and they may occasionally bleed. Warts may cause itching, redness, or discomfort. An outbreak of genital warts may also cause psychological distr

name: Excessive wrinkling of palmar skin
synonyms: Redundant, wrinkled skin of palms

name: Abnormality of secondary sexual hair
definition: Abnormality of the growth of secondary sexual hair, which normally ensues during puberty. In males, secondary sexual hair usually comprises body hair, including underarm, abdominal, chest, and pubic hair. In females, secondary sexual hair usually comprises a lesser degree of body hair, most prominently underarm and pubic hair.
synonyms: Abnormality of secondary sexual hair

name: Epidermal thickening
definition: Thickening of the epidermal layer of the skin.
synonyms: Abnormality of keratinization

name: Naevus flammeus of the eyelid
definition: Naevus flammeus localized in the skin of the eyelid.
synonyms: Port-wine stain on eyelid

name: Dermal foam cells
definition: Presence of lipid-laden macrophages (foam cells) in the inner layer of the skin (dermis).

name: Decreased adipose tissue around neck
definition: Reduced amount of adipose tissue in the region of the neck.
synonyms: Loss of adipose tissue around the neck | Loss of fat around neck

name: Decreased dermal collagen
definition: Abnormally reduced amount of collagen fibers in the dermis.

name: Brow ptosis
definition: Drooping of the upper eyebrow below the superior orbital rim.
synonyms: Drooping brow

name: Reduced epidermal collagen IV protein expression
synonyms: Skin biopsy: collagen IV antibody staining abnormal or absent

name: Palmoplantar keratoderma
definition: Abnormal thickening of the skin of the palms of the hands and the soles of the feet.
synonyms: Keratoderma | Palmar and plantar keratoderma | Thickening of palms and soles | Keratosis palmaris et plantaris | palmo-plantar keratodermas | Palmoplantar Keratoderma

name: Flushing
definition: Recurrent episodes of redness of the skin together with a sensation of warmth or burning of the affected areas of skin.

name: Congenital panfollicular nevus
definition: A hamartomatous proliferation containing malformed hair follicles in various stages of development. Panfolliculomas are well-circumscribed lesions demonstrating all stages of follicular differentiation.

name: Rete ridge flattening
definition: Rete pegs (or ridges) are the epithelial extensions that project into the underlying connective tissue in both skin and mucous membranes. Rete ridge flattening refers to the loss of these projections so that the skin epithelium acquires a relatively flat appearance.
synonyms: Flattened rete pegs | Flattened rete ridges

name: Congenital bullous ichthyosiform erythroderma
definition: An ichthyosiform abnormality of the skin that presents at birth or shortly thereafter with generalized erythema, blistering, erosions, and peeling. In the subsequent months, erythema and blistering improves but patients go on to develop hyperkeratotic scaling that is especially prominent along the joint flexures, neck, hands and feet.
synonyms: Bullous congenital ichthyosiform erythroderma | Epidermolytic hyperkeratosis

name: Kaposi's sarcoma
definition: A systemic disease which can present with cutaneous lesions with or without internal involvement. Tumors are caused by Human herpesvirus 8 (HHV8), also known as Kaposi's sarcoma-associated herpesvirus (KSHV).

name: Three rows of eyelashes
synonyms: Three rows of eyelashes | Triple row of eyelashes

name: Single trichilemmoma
definition: Presence of a unitary trichilemmoma, a benign tumor originating from the outer root sheath of the hair follicle.

name: Hyperparakeratosis
definition: Histological term to illustrate the combined presence of parakeratosis and hyperkeratosis. Abnormal keratinization of the epidermal stratum corneum (horny layer) with increased keratin formation and preservation of the nuclei in the superficial cells.
synonyms: Parahyperkeratosis | Parakeratotic hyperkeratosis

name: Acral ulceration
definition: A type of digital ulcer that manifests as an open sore on the surface of the skin at the tip of a finger or toe.

name: Maculopapular exanthema
definition: A skin rash that is characterized by diffuse cutaneous erythema with areas of skin elevation. It may evolve to vesicles or papules as part of a more severe clinical entity. Different degrees of angioedema with involvement of subcutaneous tissue may also appear.

name: Scleroderma
definition: A chronic autoimmune phenomenon characterized by fibrosis (or hardening) and vascular alterations of the skin.
synonyms: Progressive systemic scleroderma | Pseudoscleroderma

name: Holster sign
definition: Symmetric poikiloderma of hips and lateral thighs below the greater trochanter.

name: Abnormal platysma muscle morphology
definition: An abnormality of the platysma muscle.
synonyms: Abnormality of platysma | Abnormality of the platysma muscle

name: Thin nail
definition: Nail that appears thin when viewed on end.
synonyms: Thin nail | Thin nails

name: Reduced epidermal keratin 10 protein expression
definition: Amount of keratin 10 in the epidermis below the lower limit of normal. The findiong is typically ascertained by immunofluorescent microscopy.

name: Adermatoglyphia
definition: A skin disease characterized by lack of epidermal ridges on the fingers, toes, palms and soles that has_material_basis_in heterozygous mutation in the SMARCAD1 gene on chromosome 4q22.3.
synonyms: Absence of fingerprints | ADERM | ADG | Congenital absence of fingerprints | Immigration delay disease | Isolated congenital adermatoglyphia

name: Ichthyosis linearis circumflexa
definition: A type of ichthyosis characterized by migratory, annular and polycyclic erythematous patches with double-edged scales at the periphery of the lesions.
synonyms: Double-edged scaling | Serpiginous scaling

name: Shawl sign
definition: Erythematous, poikilodermatous macules distributed in a shawl pattern over the shoulders, arms and upper back.

name: Livedo racemosa
definition: Livedo racemosa describes a reddish-blue mottling of the skin in an irregular, reticular pattern. It differs from the more common livedo reticularis by its shape. Livedo racemosa consists of broken circular segments resulting in a seemingly larger pattern, as opposed to the fine, regular, complete network of livedo reticularis. Livedo racemosa results from permanent impairment of peripheral blood flow and, unlike livedo reticularis, it persists on warming.

name: Eyelid erythema
definition: Redness of the skin of the eyelids, caused by hyperemia of the capillaries in the lower layers of the skin.
synonyms: Erythema of eyelid | Erythema of the eyelids | Eyelid erythema | Red eyelid

name: Reduced epidermal kindlin-1 expression
definition: Lower than normal amount of kindlin-1 in the epidermis.

name: Abnormal epidermal morphology
definition: An abnormality of the morphology of the epidermis.
synonyms: Abnormality of epidermal morphology

name: Patchy alopecia
definition: Transient, non-scarring hair loss and preservation of the hair follicle located in in well-defined patches.
synonyms: Alopecia areata | Patchy baldness

name: Aplasia cutis congenita
definition: A developmental defect resulting in the congenital absence of skin in multiple or solitary non-inflammatory, well-demarcated, oval or circular ulcers with a diameter of about 1 to 2 cm. Aplasia cutis congenita most commonly occurs on the scalp, but may present in the face, trunk, or limbs.
synonyms: Absence of part of skin at birth | Congenital absence of skin | Congenital scars | Cutis aplasia

name: Multiple rows of eyelashes
synonyms: Double row of eyelashes | Extra rows of eyelashes | Multiple rows of eyelashes | Two rows of eyelashes

name: Solar urticaria
definition: Urticaria in response to exposure to ultraviolet-A (UVA), ultraviolet-B (UVB), visible and rarely infrared light.

name: Skin tenting due to fracture
definition: Skin tenting may occur in the setting of a fracture when a displaced bone fragment pushes on the skin, causing it to bulge outward in a tent-like shape.

name: Collagenoma
definition: A rare hamartomatous malformation characterized by the predominant proliferation of normal collagen fibers and normal, decreased, or increased elastic fibers. Collagenomas may be solitary or multiple, sporadic, acquired or inherited.

name: Reticulated skin pigmentation
synonyms: Reticular pigmentation pattern | Reticulate skin pigmentation

name: Caseous vernix-like desquamation
definition: Vernix caseosa is a physiological, viscous biofilm that is produced by desquamated fetal skin and sebaceous glands covering the fetus at the third trimester in-utero. The substance's gross morphology in post-partum is described by the etymology, as vernix means varnish, and caseosa means cheesy-like matter. This finding refers to an abnormally thick and greasy vernix caseosa-like scale present at birth.
synonyms: Greasy, thick vernix caseosa-like scale

name: Palmar hyperlinearity
definition: Exaggerated skin markings (dermatoglyphics) on the palms of the hand.

name: Nevus psiloliparus
definition: Nevus psiloliparus is a rare fatty tissue nevus that is a marker for encephalocraniocutaneous lipomatosis, a neurocutaneous syndrome with ocular and central nervous system anomalies. Clinically, nevus psiloliparus is often described as a congenital alopecia and appears as an irregularly shaped, circumscribed area of alopecia on the scalp. Histopathology demonstrates a near-complete absence of mature hair follicles with preservation of arrector pili muscles and mature adipocytes within the dermis

name: Plantar ecchymosis
definition: A purpuric lesion that is larger than 1 cm in diameter and is located on the sole of the foot.

name: Patchy hypo- and hyperpigmentation
synonyms: Patchy hypo- and hyper-pigmentation

name: Abnormal epidermis stratum granulosum morphology
definition: An abnormal structure of the stratum granulosum, which is is a thin layer of cells in the epidermis lying above the stratum spinosum and below the stratum corneum.

name: Abnormal subungual morphology
definition: A lesion located beneath a fingernail or toenail.
synonyms: Abnormality of the subungual region

name: Nonepidermolytic palmoplantar hyperkeratosis
definition: Abnormal thickening of the skin on the palms and soles charactersized by hyperkeratosis of the stratum corneum with no evidence of epidermolysis characteristic of epidermolytic hyperkeratosis.
synonyms: Nonepidermolytic palmoplantar keratoderma

name: Blue nevus
definition: A solitary, bluish, smooth surfaced macule, papule or plaque that is generally round or oval in shape. The histopathology of blue nevi varies by subtype, but general characteristics include a vertical wedge or bulbous shaped proliferation of spindle cells, dendritic melanocytes, and melanophages into a sclerotic dermis or subcutis.
synonyms: Congenital dermal melanocytosis

name: Prominent veins on trunk
definition: Prominent thoracic and abdominal veins.

name: Abnormal nail shape
definition: An abnormality affecting the outline (shape) or contour of the nail.

name: Oral cavity telangiectasia
definition: Presence of telangiectases in the oral cavity.
synonyms: Angioectasias of the mouth | Angioectasias of the oral cavity | Oral cavity teleangiectasia | Spider veins of the mouth | Spider veins of the oral cavity

name: Conjunctival telangiectasia
definition: The presence of small (ca. 0.5-1.0 mm) dilated blood vessels near the surface of the mucous membranes of the conjunctiva.
synonyms: Conjunctival telangiectases | Small dilated blood vessels near membrane covering front of eye and eyelids | Telangiectasia, conjunctival

name: Skin plaque
definition: A plaque is a solid, raised, plateau-like (flat-topped) lesion greater than 1 cm in diameter.

name: Skin erosion
definition: A discontinuity of the skin exhibiting incomplete loss of the epidermis, a lesion that is moist, circumscribed, and usually depressed.

name: Tufted hairs
definition: The presence of tufts of 8-15 hairs that appear to emerge from a single follicular orifice.

name: Localized epidermolytic hyperkeratosis
synonyms: Localised epidermolytic hyperkeratosis

name: Pyoderma gangrenosum
definition: A deep skin ulcer with a well defined border, which is usually violet or blue. The ulcer edge is often undermined (worn and damaged) and the surrounding skin is erythematous and indurated. The ulcer often starts as a small papule or collection of papules, which break down to form small ulcers with a so called cat's paw appearance. These coalesce and the central area then undergoes necrosis to form a single ulcer.

name: Abnormal position of hair whorl
definition: Hair growth from a single point on the scalp in any location other than lateral to the midline and close to the vertex of the skull.
synonyms: Abnormal location of hair swirl | Abnormal position of hair whorl

name: Toenail onycholysis
definition: Painless and spontaneous separation of a toenail from the nail bed.
synonyms: Detachment of toenails | Onycholysis of toenails

name: Absent nail of hallux
definition: Absent nail of big toe.
synonyms: Absent big toe nail | Absent nail of big toe

name: Skin detachment
definition: Loss of sections of skin either spontaneously or after gentle handling.
synonyms: Detached skin | Epidermal detachment | Skin sloughing

name: Postnatal-onset ichthyosiform erythroderma
definition: A type of ichthyosiform erythroderma with postnatal onset.
synonyms: Postnatal-onset ichthyosis

name: Perifollicular fibroma
definition: Perifollicular fibroma is a rare cutaneous hamartoma that shows differentiation in the connective tissue sheath of hair follicles. It can occur as a solitary papule or as multiple lesions. Histologically, the lesion consists of a concentric arrangement of cellular fibrous tissue around a normal hair follicle.

name: Atypical scarring of skin
definition: Atypically scarred skin .
synonyms: Atypical scarring | Atypical scarring of skin

name: Pressure ulcer
definition: A type of ulcer that is caused when an area of skin is subject to pressure over a prolonged period of time, ranging in range in severity from patches of discolored skin to open wounds that expose the underlying bone or muscle. The most common sites are the sacrum, coccyx, heels and the hips.
synonyms: Bedsore | Decubitus Ulcer | Pressure Sore | Pressure ulcer

name: Reduced lamina lucida anchoring filament density
definition: Diminished amount of the anchoring filaments that normally bridge the lamina lucida and insert into the lamina densa in the cutaneous basement membrane zone.

name: Angioma serpentinum
definition: Angioma serpiginosum consists of punctate, tightly packed telangiectatic lesions. Characteristic histopathological features are dilated and tortuous capillaries involving the uppermost part of the dermis.

name: Hyperconvex fingernails
definition: When viewed on end (with the finger tip pointing toward the examiner's eye) the curve of the fingernail forms a tighter curve of convexity.
synonyms: Tubular fingernails

name: Nail dystrophy
definition: Onychodystrophy (nail dystrophy) refers to nail changes apart from changes of the color (nail dyschromia) and involves partial or complete disruption of the various keratinous layers of the nail plate.
synonyms: Dystrophic nails | Onychodystrophy | Poor nail formation

name: Low posterior hairline
definition: Hair on the neck extends more inferiorly than usual.
synonyms: Low hairline at back of neck | Low posterior hair line

name: Convex contour of sole
definition: The contour of the foot in lateral profile has a convex shape.

name: Oropharyngeal squamous cell carcinoma
definition: A squamous cell carcinoma that originates in the oropharnyx.

name: Abnormal rete ridge morphology
definition: Abnormal structure of the rete ridges (also known as rete pegs), which are downward projections of epithelium surrounding the connective tissue papillae in between the dermal papillae.

name: Dermal multinucleated giant cells
definition: Presence of giant cells in the dermis. Giant cells are formed by fusion of various cells such as macrophage, epithelioid cells, monocytes, etc., These are multi-nucleated, large in size, and generally present at the site of chronic inflammation and other granulomatous conditions.
synonyms: Multinucleated giant cells in skin

name: Knuckle pad
definition: Knuckle pads are benign fibrofatty subcutaneous pads located over the proximal interphalangeal (PIP) joints that can be mistaken for arthritis. Rarely they affect the dorsal aspect of the metacarpophalangeal (MCP) joints. Clinically they are painless and often affect both hands in an asymmetrical pattern.
synonyms: DDN | Dorsal dupuytren nodules | Knuckle pads on dorsal aspect of finger joints

name: Cold urticaria
definition: Urticaria may be caused by cold temperatures.

name: Frontal cutaneous lipoma
definition: Presence of a cutaneous lipoma on the forehead.

name: Abnormal eyelash morphology
definition: An abnormality of the eyelashes.
synonyms: Abnormal eyelashes | Abnormality of the eyelashes | Eyelash abnormality

name: Abnormal nail attachment
definition: An anomaly of the connection of the nail to the nailbed.

name: Keratosis pilaris
definition: An anomaly of the hair follicles of the skin that typically presents as small, rough, brown folliculocentric papules distributed over characteristic areas of the skin, particularly the outer-upper arms and thighs.
synonyms: Carpet tack sign | Chicken skin | Follicular keratosis | Follicular keratotic plug | Follicular plugging | Hyperkeratosis pilaris | Lichen pilaris

name: Slough
definition: Slough is a type of necrotic skin lesion that is characterized as being yellow, tan, green or brown in color and may be moist, loose and stringy in appearance.

name: Neutrophilic urticarial dermatosis
definition: A neutrophilic interstitial, perivascular and/or perieccrine infiltrate with leukocytoclasia. Notably, leukocytoclastic vasculitis is not present.

name: Soft skin
definition: Subjective impression of increased softness upon palpation of the skin.
synonyms: Soft skin | Velvety skin | Velvety skin texture

name: Atopic dermatitis
definition: Atopic dermatitis (AD) or atopic eczema is an itchy, inflammatory skin condition with a predilection for the skin flexures. It is characterized by poorly defined erythema with edema, vesicles, and weeping in the acute stage and skin thickening (lichenification) in the chronic stage.
synonyms: Allergic eczema | Atopic dermatitis, chronic | Atopic eczema | Baby eczema | Dermatitis, Atopic | Infantile eczema | Neurodermatitis | Prurigo Besnier | allergic dermatitis | atopic eczema

name: Absent pigmentation of the ventral chest
definition: Lack of skin pigmentation (coloring) of the anterior chest.

name: Postauricular pit
definition: Benign congenital lesion of the postauricular soft tissue consisting of a blind-ending narrow tube or pit.
synonyms: Pit behind the ear | Postauricular earpits | Postauricular fistula | Posterior auricular pit | Posterior auricular sinus

name: Absent palmar crease
definition: The absence of the major creases of the palm (distal transverse crease, proximal transverse crease, or thenar crease).
synonyms: Absence of the palmar creases | Absent palm lines | Aplasia of the palmar creases

name: Reduced hair sulfur content
definition: Abnormally low amount of sulfur in hair.
synonyms: Hair sulfur content reduced | Hair sulphur content reduced

name: Platonychia
definition: Abnormal flat nail.

name: Comedo
definition: A clogged cutaneous sebaceous follicle, which is a cutaneous gland that secretes sebum (usually into a hair follicle).

name: Trichiasis
definition: Inversion and rubbing of the eyelashes against the globe of the eye.
synonyms: Ingrown eyelashes | Introversion of eyelashes | Trichiasis of eyelid eyelashes

name: Keratoacanthoma
definition: Keratoacanthoma (KA) is a common benign epithelial tumor that originates from the pilosebaceous glands. In most cases, it is characterized by rapid evolution, followed by spontaneous resolution over 4 to 6 months. KA usually presents as a solitary flesh-coloured nodule with a central keratin plug on the sun-exposed skin of elderly individuals.

name: Palmoplantar blistering
definition: A type of blistering that affects the skin of the palms of the hands and the soles of the feet.

name: Absent keratohyalin granules
definition: Lack of keratohyalin granules, which are normally present in the stratum granulosum of the epidermal layer of the skin.

name: Enlarged lunula
definition: Abnormal enlargement of the visible portion of the distal nail matrix that extends beyond the proximal nail fold, which is referred to as the lunula.
synonyms: Macrolunula | Nails: lunulae enlarged

name: Livedo
definition: A reddish-blue mottled condition of skin caused by inflammation of the cutaneous blood vessels.
synonyms: Livedoid dermatitis

name: Absent facial hair
definition: Absence of facial hair.
synonyms: Absent facial hair

name: Nail bed telangiectasia
definition: Telangiectases in the area of the nails.
synonyms: Nail bed telangiectases

name: Erythema
definition: Redness of the skin, caused by hyperemia of the capillaries in the lower layers of the skin.
synonyms: Redness of skin or mucous membrane

name: Palmar pruritus
definition: Pruritus is an itch or a sensation that makes a person want to scratch. This term refers to an abnormally increased sensation of itching over the palm(s) of the hand.
synonyms: Itchy palm

name: Sparse hair
definition: Reduced density of hairs.
synonyms: Decreased hair growth | Decreased hair growth on body | Hypotrichosis | Marked hypotrichosis | Sparse hair | Sparse hair since birth | Thin, sparse hair

name: Abnormality of the frontal hairline
definition: An anomaly in the placement or shape of the hairline (trichion) on the forehead, that is, the border between skin on the forehead that has head hair and that does not.
synonyms: Abnormality of hairline at front of head | Abnormality of the frontal hairline

name: Annular cutaneous lesion
definition: A lesion of the skin with a ring-like distribution.

name: Abnormality of the skin
definition: An abnormality of the skin.
synonyms: Abnormality of the skin | Dermatopathy | Dermopathy | Skin abnormality

name: Pterygium
definition: Pterygia are 'winglike' triangular membranes occurring in the neck, eyes, knees, elbows, ankles or digits.
synonyms: Pterygia

name: Neck pterygia
definition: Pterygia affecting the neck.
synonyms: Neck pterygium

name: Lack of facial subcutaneous fat
synonyms: Lack of facial fat below the skin

name: Perioral hyperpigmentation
definition: Increased pigmentation, either focal or generalized, of the skin surrounding the vermilion of the lips.
synonyms: Darkening of skin around the mouth | Increased pigmentation around the mouth

name: Cutaneous wound
definition: A cutaneous wound is a defined as a disruption of normal anatomic structure and function of the skin that occurs owing to an injury of the skin. Wound healing is a dynamic, interactive process involving soluble mediators, blood cells, extracellularmatrix, and parenchymal cells. Wound healing has three phases: inflammation, tissue formation, and tissue remodeling, that overlap in time.
synonyms: Skin wound

name: Ochronosis
definition: Brown or blue-gray discoloration of the skin that can present on the axillary and inguinal areas, face, palms or soles. In addition, blue-black discoloration can be apparent on skin overlying cartilage in which the pigment is deposited, such as the ears. This is a characteristic manifestation of alkaptonuria, which is an autosomal recessively inherited deficiency of homogentisic acid oxidase that results in accumulation of homogentisic acid in collagenous structures. The sclerae are also typical
synonyms: Ochronotic arthritis

name: Digital pitting scar
definition: Pinhole-sized concave depressions with hyperkeratosis in the skin of a finger or toe.

name: Palmoplantar cutis laxa
definition: Loose, wrinkled skin of hands and feet.
synonyms: Excessive wrinkled skin of palms and soles | Furrowed palms and soles | Increased wrinkles of palms and soles | Wrinkled palms and soles | Wrinkled skin of hands and feet

name: Fetal skin edema
definition: A separation of skin in one or more regions of the body or even along the entire length of body wall (to a degree greater than gestational-age related norms) related to pathologically increased fluid accumulation in the subcutaneous tissue.

name: Periungual teleangiectasia
definition: Telangiectasia (small dilated blood vessels) located near to the fingernails or toenails.

name: Pigment incontinence
definition: A process in which melanosomes (melanin granules) are deposited in the dermis. The dermal melanosomes are observed to be mainly in macrophages. This phenomenon of pigmentary incontinence usually follows an inflammatory process with the basic feature of basal cell damage, such as in lichen planus, lupus erythematosus, Riehl's melanosis, incontinentia pigmenti (Bloch-Sulzberger), and fixed drug eruption. Incontinence of pigment, or dropping off of epidermal melanin into the dermis, frequently prod
synonyms: Pigmentary incontinence in papillary dermis

name: Intercrural pterygium
definition: A pterygium (or pterygia) in the intercrural (groin) region.

name: Nevus flammeus nuchae
definition: Naevus flammeus localized in the skin of the neck. This is one of the most common birthmarks and present in approximately 25% of all newborns.
synonyms: Angel's kiss | Port-wine stain on neck | Salmon patch | Stork bite

name: Hordeolum externum
definition: Hordeola externa are acute purulent infections affecting the sebaceous glands of Zeis or the apocrine sweat glands of Moll, often caused by staphylococcus infections. In contrast to chalazia, hordeola are extremely painfull and can cause extreme local swelling.
synonyms: external stye

name: Aplasia of the eccrine sweat glands
synonyms: Absent eccrine sweat glands

name: Aplasia cutis congenita of scalp
definition: A developmental defect resulting in the congenital absence of skin on the scalp.
synonyms: Defect of scalp | Focal absence of scalp tissue | Scalp aplasia cutis congenita | Scalp defect | Solitary scalp defect

name: Discrete 2 to 5-mm hyper- and hypopigmented macules
Periauricular skin pits
definition: Benign congenital lesions of the periauricular soft tissue consisting of a blind-ending narrow tube or pit.
synonyms: Periauricular earpits | Periauricular fistulas | Periauricular pits | Periauricular sinus | Pits around the ear

name: Absent fingernail
definition: Absence of a fingernail.
synonyms: Absent fingernail | Anonychia of fingernails | Aplasia of the fingernail

name: Psoriasiform lesion
definition: A skin lesions that resembles the lesions observed in psoriasis, viz., an erythematous plaque covered by fine silvery scales. Psoriasiform lesions can be observed in psoriasis as well as in other conditions including allergic contact dermatitis, seborrhoeic dermatitis, Atopic dermatitis, pityriasis rubra, and lichen simplex chronicus.
synonyms: Erythemato-squamous plaque | Erythematosquamous plaque | Psoriatic-like lesion

name: Premature glabellar skin wrinkling
definition: The presence in the skin of the glabellar region of an increased degree of wrinkling (irregular folds and indentations) of the skin as compared with age-related norms.

name: Abnormal skin adnexa morphology
definition: An abnormality of the skin adnexa (skin appendages), which are specialized skin structures located within the dermis and focally within the subcutaneous fatty tissue, comprising three histologically distinct structures: (1) the pilosebaceous unit (hair follicle and sebaceous glands); (2) the eccrine sweat glands; and (3) the apocrine glands.
synonyms: Abnormal skin appendage | Abnormality of skin adnexa morphology

name: Prominent eyelashes
definition: Eyelashes that draw the attention of the viewer due to increased density and/or length and/or curl without meeting the criteria of trichomegaly.
synonyms: Prominent eyelashes | Thick eyelashes

name: Absent second fingernail
definition: Absence of the fingernail of the index (second) finger.

name: Psoriasiform dermatitis
definition: A skin abnormality characterized by redness and irritation, with thick, red skin that displays flaky, silver-white patches (scales).
synonyms: Psoriasis

name: Atrophic scars
definition: Scars that form a depression compared to the level of the surrounding skin because of damage to the collagen, fat or other tissues below the skin.
synonyms: Sunken or indented skin due to damage | Thin, atrophic scars

name: Hypermelanotic macule
definition: A hyperpigmented circumscribed area of change in normal skin color without elevation or depression of any size.
synonyms: Hyperpigmented macules | Hyperpigmented skin patches | Hyperpigmented spots

name: Hypoplastic fifth fingernail
definition: A nail of the fifth finger that is diminished in length and width, i.e., underdeveloped nail of little finger.
synonyms: Underdeveloped fifth fingernail | Underdeveloped fingernail of little finger | Underdeveloped fingernail of pinkie finger | Underdeveloped fingernail of pinky finger

name: Concave nail
definition: The natural longitudinal (posterodistal) convex arch is not present or is inverted.
synonyms: Koilonychia | Spoon-shaped nails

name: Sparse upper eyelashes
synonyms: Hypotrichosis of upper eyelashes | Partial absence of upper eyelashes | Sparse upper eyelashes

name: Basal cell carcinoma
definition: The presence of a basal cell carcinoma of the skin.
synonyms: Basal cell carcinomas | Basal cell epithelioma | Basal cell nevus | Basalioma | Basal cell cancer | Basal cell carcinoma of skin | Basal cell neoplasm | Basal cell tumor | Epithelioma basal cell | malignant Basal cell neoplasm

name: Nevus comedonicus
definition: A type of epidermal nevus characterized by closely arranged, dilated follicular openings with keratinous plugs resembling classical comedones.

name: Nasal mucosa telangiectasia
definition: Telangiectasia of the nasal mucosa.
synonyms: Angioectasia of mucosa of nose | Angioectasia of mucous membrane of nose | Angioectasia of nasal mucous membrane | Nasal mucous membrane telangiectasia | Spider veins of mucosa of nose | Spider veins of mucous membrane of nose | Spider veins of nasal mucous membrane | Telangiectasia of mucosa of nose | Telangiectasia of mucous membrane of nose | Telangiectasia of nasal mucous membrane

name: Atypical nevus
definition: A large pigmented lesion measuring 5-15 mm in diameter with irregular, notched, and ill defined border and with color that may range from tan to dark brown to pink.
synonyms: Atypical mole | Dysplastic Nevus

name: Ectodermal dysplasia
definition: Ectodermal dysplasia is a group of conditions in which there is abnormal development of the skin, hair, nails, teeth, or sweat glands.

name: Hyperkeratotic papule
definition: A circumscribed, solid elevation of skin with no visible fluid, varying in size from a pinhead to less than 10mm in diameter at the widest point that is composed of localized hyperkeratosis (the latter may be demonstrated histopathologically).

name: Piebald skin depigmentation
definition: Congenital large depigmented (white) macule of irergular rhomboid shape. Piebald skin depigmentation generally presents with multiple such macules in the affected individual. There may be smaller (5-15mm), discrete, skin-colored and hyperpigmented macules interspersed within the depigmented macules.
synonyms: Piebaldism

name: Hyperpigmented papule
definition: A papule (circumscribed, solid elevation of skin with no visible fluid, varying in size from a pinhead to less than 10mm in diameter at the widest point) that exhibits increased pigmentation (is darker) compared to the surrounding skin.

name: Parakeratosis
definition: Abnormal formation of the keratinocytes of the epidermis characterized by persistence of nuclei, incomplete formation of keratin, and moistness and swelling of the keratinocytes.

name: Abnormality of skin adnexa physiology
definition: Any functional anomaly of the skin adnexa (skin appendages), which are specialized skin structures located within the dermis and focally within the subcutaneous fatty tissue, comprising three histologically distinct structures: (1) the pilosebaceous unit (hair follicle and sebaceous glands); (2) the eccrine sweat glands; and (3) the apocrine glands.

name: Nevus sebaceous
definition: A congenital, hairless plaque consisting of overgrown epidermis, sebaceous glands, hair follicles, apocrine glands and connective tissue. They are a variant of epidermal naevi. Sebaceous naevi most often appear on the scalp, but they may also arise on the face, neck or forehead. At birth, a sevaceous nevus typically appears as a solitary, smooth, yellow-orange hairless patch. Sebaceous naevi become more pronounced around adolescence, often appearing bumpy, warty or scaly.
synonyms: Naevus sebaceous | Organoid nevus | Sebaceous mole | Sebaceous naevus | Sebaceous nevus

name: Indurated nodule
definition: A skin nodule that is unusually hard (indurated).

name: Lymphocytoma cutis
definition: Lymphocytoma cutis, or Spiegler-Fendt sarcoid, is classed as one of the pseudolymphomas, referring to inflammatory disorders in which the accumulation of lymphocytes on the skin resemble, clinically and histopathologically, cutaneous lymphomas. Careful clinical evaluation, histopathological and immunohistochemical exams may be needed to make the correct diagnosis.
synonyms: Skin pseudolymphoma | Spiegler-Fendt sarcoid

name: Elevated dermal desmosine content
definition: An increased amount of desmosine measure in the skin. Desmosine is a cross-linking amino acid formed from lysyl residues in elastin.

name: Follicular infundibulum tumor
definition: A cutaneous adnexal neoplasm with variable clinical presentation. It tends to be located in the head and neck and the presentation is papulonodular, scaly, asymptomatic, measuring up to 1-2cm, simulating a basal cell carcinoma.
synonyms: Basal cell hamartoma with follicular differentiation | Follicular infundibulum tumour | follicular infundibulum tumour | neoplasm of the Follicular Infundibulum | tumor of follicular infundibulum | tumour of follicular infundibulum

name: Aplasia/Hypoplasia of the eccrine sweat glands
definition: Absence or developmental hypoplasia of the eccrine sweat glands.
synonyms: Hypoplastic-absent eccrine sweat glands

name: Perifollicular hyperkeratosis
definition: Increased amount of keratin (visible as white scales) surrounding hair follicles.

name: Generalized hypopigmentation
synonyms: Fair skin | Generalised hypopigmentation | Pale pigmentation

name: Self-healing squamous epithelioma
definition: A type of skin tumor that initially presents as a reddish macule and subsequently becomes papular, enlarged, ulcerated and ultimately heals leaving pitted scars.

name: Melanin pigment aggregation in hair shafts
Lateral venous anomaly
definition: Persistence of the embryonic dorsal or sciatic vein system that normally should have involuted around the tenth to twelfth week of intrauterine life.
synonyms: Klippel-Trenaunay vein | Lateral marginal vein of Servelle | Vein of Servelle

name: Popliteal pterygium
definition: A pterygium (or pterygia) occurring in the popliteal region (the back of the knee).

name: Retinal telangiectasia
definition: Localized, irregular dilatation of small tortuous intraretinal blood vessels.

name: Pruritus
